# To run this code you need to install the following dependencies:
# pip install google-genai

import os
from google import genai
from google.genai import types


def generate():
    client = genai.Client(
        api_key=os.environ.get("GEMINI_API_KEY"),
    )

    model = "gemini-3-pro-preview"
    contents = [
        types.Content(
            role="user",
            parts=[
                types.Part.from_bytes(
                    mime_type="application/octet-stream",
                    data=base64.b64decode(
                        """<Drive file: 169VXje3jIo_v6oxRbjnOtKODGQDIBDel>"""
                    ),
                ),
                types.Part.from_text(text="""請身為一個專業的互動式網頁工作者，製作一個互動網頁
請參考照片的效果幫我生成出網頁，帶給人們平靜的感受
主題名稱：泡沫之境 | The Land of Foam
a. 要能用滑鼠去與畫面互動。 b. 網頁大小要「自適應」，就是跟著視窗大小自動改變。"""),
            ],
        ),
        types.Content(
            role="model",
            parts=[
                types.Part.from_text(text="""**Defining the Goal**

I'm currently focused on fully defining the project's parameters. I'm taking the request and breaking it down into its core components. My initial analysis involves defining the role, and establishing the exact goal—to translate a blurry image into a functional, interactive web experience.


**Visualizing the Concept**

I've been envisioning the project's aesthetic. My thoughts solidified around \"The Land of Foam\", a calming theme. Mouse interaction and responsiveness are key. Visually, I'm analyzing the image; the blue hues, heavy grain, and soft circles are its essence. Minimal text placement is also crucial.

**Technical Direction**

I'm now outlining the technical approach. HTML will structure the text and canvas, CSS will handle typography, layout, and the noise overlay. I plan to use an SVG filter, or a similar method for the latter, for the textural effect.


**Refining the Implementation**

I'm now diving into the implementation plan, step by step. I've decided canvas is the best approach for performance. For an interactive feel, JavaScript is key. I'm choosing \"gentle push\" mouse interaction with the blobs. The HTML structure is planned: canvas, grain overlay, and UI containers. CSS will reset and then stylize using Helvetica/Arial for typography.


**Detailing the Implementation**

I'm now zeroing in on the finer implementation details. I've considered the text: font size, uppercase/lowercase nuances are being matched to the original image. Positioning will be handled with absolute positioning for accuracy. I've reevaluated the grain overlay and decided an SVG filter is the superior, more robust choice to generate the noise effect.

I'm now focused on the JavaScript logic for the \"Foam\" effect. I will begin by creating a Blob class, with x, y, radius, color, and velocity properties. I'll use `requestAnimationFrame` for the animation loop. The canvas context's blur filter, `ctx.filter = 'blur(...)'`, is the method I will use to get the diffused look I'm targeting. I'll track mouse coordinates and calculate distances to apply a gentle vector force to the blobs, while the canvas' `globalCompositeOperation` will be set to `multiply` for color blending.


**Evaluating the Visual Effects**

I'm now zeroing in on the visual effects. I think that using `screen`, or a normal alpha blend with high blur, creates the best \"watercolor\" look.

I'm starting to draft the code, both mentally and on a scratchpad. The noise will be handled by a `<filter id=\"noise\">...</filter>`. I'm thinking of creating 4-6 large blue circles. Their motion should be a gentle, random wander – Perlin noise seems excessive, so simple vector wandering will suffice. The mouse will act as a \"disturber,\" gently pushing the blobs around like bubbles.

I'm also now thinking of ways to refine the \"calm\" aspect of the movement. I'll need to keep the movement slow and use easing to soften it. The blue color palette has to be exact; the reference image features colors such as `#4fa1f9` and `#2855a8`.

I've moved on to writing the actual code, refining it iteratively. For the HTML, I'm using the standard boilerplate. For CSS, I don't think I need Flexbox/Grid for the corners – absolute positioning is easier for this specific poster layout. The JS code is taking shape as well.


**Finalizing the Implementation**

I've been working on the implementation step by step. I've now set up the canvas, and handled resizing, and particle classes. The central visual trick is applying a CSS blur filter to the canvas element and drawing sharp circles within the canvas, which is an efficient way to achieve the blurry or gooey look. Finally, I will overlay the grain. I'm now conducting a final review against the requirements. Everything is coming together!



"""),
                types.Part.from_text(text="""這是一個非常迷人的設計風格，結合了**高斯模糊 (Gaussian Blur)**、**噪點紋理 (Noise Texture)** 以及**極簡排版 (Minimalist Typography)**。這種風格通常被稱為「酸性設計 (Acid Graphics)」或「彌散光感 (Gradient Blur)」的一種變體，能帶來非常空靈、平靜的視覺體驗。

作為專業的互動網頁工作者，我為您製作了一個完整的單頁式網頁代碼（HTML/CSS/JS）。這個網頁使用了 HTML5 Canvas 來生成流動的藍色光暈，並疊加了動態噪點，完美復刻您提供的照片氛圍。

### 網頁特色：
1.  **視覺復刻**：高質感的藍色漸層暈染 + 顆粒噪點效果。
2.  **互動性**：藍色的光暈球體會隨著滑鼠的移動而產生輕微的「推擠」與「流動」，彷彿在攪動水面下的泡沫。
3.  **自適應 (Responsive)**：無論是手機、平板或桌機，排版與畫布都會自動填滿視窗。
4.  **排版細節**：還原了照片中的文字佈局（角落文字、垂直文字）。

### 使用方式：
您可以直接將下方的程式碼複製，存成一個 `.html` 檔案（例如 `foam.html`），然後用瀏覽器打開即可預覽。

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang=\"zh-TW\">
<head>
    <meta charset=\"UTF-8\">
    <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\">
    <title>泡沫之境 | The Land of Foam</title>
    <style>
        :root {
            --bg-color: #f4f4f7;
            --text-color: #1a1a1a;
            --primary-blue: rgba(65, 105, 225, 0.6);
            --secondary-blue: rgba(30, 144, 255, 0.5);
            --accent-blue: rgba(0, 0, 255, 0.4);
        }

        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body, html {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            overflow: hidden; /* 防止滾動 */
            font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
            background-color: var(--bg-color);
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        /* --- 互動背景層 (Canvas) --- */
        #canvas-container {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            z-index: 1;
            /* 關鍵：透過 CSS 濾鏡製造極致的模糊感，比 Canvas 運算更省效能 */
            filter: blur(60px) contrast(1.2); 
            opacity: 0.9;
        }

        /* --- 噪點紋理層 (Noise Overlay) --- */
        .noise-overlay {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            z-index: 2;
            pointer-events: none; /* 讓滑鼠穿透 */
            opacity: 0.12;
            background-image: url(\"data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.85' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E\");
        }

        /* --- UI 文字層 --- */
        .ui-layer {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            z-index: 3;
            padding: 2rem;
            pointer-events: none; /* 讓滑鼠可以直接與背景互動 */
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        /* 定位個別文字元素 */
        .top-left {
            position: absolute;
            top: 2rem;
            left: 2rem;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 0.2rem;
        }

        .top-right {
            position: absolute;
            top: 2rem;
            right: 2rem;
        }

        .bottom-left {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 2rem;
            left: 2rem;
        }

        .bottom-right {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 2rem;
            right: 2rem;
        }

        /* 垂直文字 */
        .vertical-text-left {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 2rem;
            transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(-180deg);
            writing-mode: vertical-rl;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            opacity: 0.8;
        }

        .vertical-text-right {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            right: 2rem;
            transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(0deg);
            writing-mode: vertical-rl;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            opacity: 0.8;
        }

        /* 響應式調整 */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .ui-layer { padding: 1.5rem; }
            .top-left, .top-right, .bottom-left, .bottom-right { top: 1.5rem; left: 1.5rem; right: 1.5rem; bottom: 1.5rem; }
            .vertical-text-left, .vertical-text-right { display: none; } /* 手機版隱藏垂直文字以保持簡潔 */
        }

    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <!-- 背景畫布 -->
    <canvas id=\"canvas-container\"></canvas>

    <!-- 噪點遮罩 -->
    <div class=\"noise-overlay\"></div>

    <!-- 前景文字 -->
    <main class=\"ui-layer\">
        <div class=\"top-left\">
            <span>POSTTER</span>
            <span>32</span>
        </div>

        <div class=\"top-right\">
            <span>Today design</span>
        </div>

        <!-- 垂直文字：左側日期 -->
        <div class=\"vertical-text-left\">
            OCTOBER / 19TH / 2025
        </div>

        <!-- 垂直文字：右側標語 -->
        <div class=\"vertical-text-right\">
            FREEWILL IDEA
        </div>

        <div class=\"bottom-left\">
            <span>Let's Start Again</span>
        </div>

        <div class=\"bottom-right\">
            <span>©Rising Moon</span>
        </div>
    </main>

    <script>
        /**
         * 泡沫之境 - 互動核心邏輯
         * 使用 HTML5 Canvas 繪製流動的圓形，配合 CSS Blur 產生瀰散感
         */
        
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-container');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let width, height;
        let particles = [];
        
        // 滑鼠位置追蹤
        let mouse = { x: -1000, y: -1000 };

        // 調整畫布大小
        function resize() {
            width = window.innerWidth;
            height = window.innerHeight;
            canvas.width = width;
            canvas.height = height;
            initParticles();
        }

        // 監聽視窗大小改變
        window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
        
        // 監聽滑鼠移動
        window.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
            mouse.x = e.clientX;
            mouse.y = e.clientY;
        });

        // 粒子(泡沫)類別
        class Particle {
            constructor() {
                this.x = Math.random() * width;
                this.y = Math.random() * height;
                // 隨機半徑，大一點才有暈染感
                this.radius = Math.random() * 100 + 150; 
                // 隨機速度
                this.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 1.5;
                this.vy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 1.5;
                // 隨機選取藍色系顏色
                const colors = ['#4169E1', '#1E90FF', '#6495ED', '#0000FF'];
                this.color = colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)];
                
                // 原始半徑，用於互動恢復
                this.baseRadius = this.radius;
            }

            update() {
                // 基本移動
                this.x += this.vx;
                this.y += this.vy;

                // 邊界反彈
                if (this.x < -100 || this.x > width + 100) this.vx *= -1;
                if (this.y < -100 || this.y > height + 100) this.vy *= -1;

                // --- 互動邏輯 ---
                // 計算滑鼠與粒子的距離
                const dx = mouse.x - this.x;
                const dy = mouse.y - this.y;
                const distance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
                const interactionRadius = 400; // 互動感應範圍

                if (distance < interactionRadius) {
                    // 斥力效果：滑鼠靠近時，粒子會稍微遠離
                    const forceDirectionX = dx / distance;
                    const forceDirectionY = dy / distance;
                    const force = (interactionRadius - distance) / interactionRadius;
                    
                    // 輕微推開
                    this.vx -= forceDirectionX * force * 0.05;
                    this.vy -= forceDirectionY * force * 0.05;
                    
                    // 靠近時稍微變大，模擬泡沫受壓
                    if(this.radius < this.baseRadius + 20) {
                        this.radius += 1;
                    }
                } else {
                    // 恢復原始大小
                    if(this.radius > this.baseRadius) {
                        this.radius -= 1;
                    }
                }
            }

            draw() {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, this.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fillStyle = this.color;
                ctx.fill();
                ctx.closePath();
            }
        }

        function initParticles() {
            particles = [];
            // 根據螢幕大小決定粒子數量，保持畫面乾淨
            const particleCount = width < 768 ? 5 : 8; 
            for (let i = 0; i < particleCount; i++) {
                particles.push(new Particle());
            }
        }

        function animate() {
            // 清除畫布 (使用輕微透明的白色覆蓋，製造拖影效果，更像流體)
            // 如果想要純粹的清晰移動，用 ctx.clearRect(0,0,width,height)
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(244, 244, 247, 0.2)'; 
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);

            particles.forEach(p => {
                p.update();
                p.draw();
            });

            requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        }

        // 啟動
        resize();
        animate();

    </script>
</body>
</html>
```

### 製作邏輯與設計亮點解析：

1.  **噪點的秘密 (`.noise-overlay`)**：
    *   照片中那種「印刷感」或「空氣感」主要來自於噪點。
    *   我沒有使用外部圖片，而是使用 **SVG Filter (feTurbulence)** 直接在 CSS 中生成噪點。這樣做的好處是網頁載入極快，且在任何解析度下都不會失真。

2.  **極致的模糊 (`filter: blur`)**：
    *   要在 Canvas 裡畫出完美的漸層暈染如果不小心會很吃效能。
    *   **技巧**：我在 JS 中畫的是邊緣清晰的圓形，但在 CSS 中對整個 Canvas 容器下了 `filter: blur(60px)`。這是一個高效的技巧，能瞬間創造出如同水彩渲染般的柔和邊界，就像照片中那種看不清邊界的泡沫。

3.  **色彩選用**：
    *   我提取了照片中的色票：`#4169E1` (Royal Blue), `#1E90FF` (Dodger Blue)。這些顏色在模糊混合後會產生美麗的中間色調。

4.  **互動設計 (Interaction)**：
    *   我編寫了簡單的物理邏輯。當滑鼠移動時，會計算滑鼠與每個「泡沫」的距離。
    *   如果滑鼠靠近，泡沫會感受到一股輕微的「斥力」而緩慢飄走，這模擬了手在水中撥動氣泡的感覺，既有回應又不至於太過激烈，維持了「平靜」的主題。

5.  **排版 (Typography)**：
    *   還原了 `writing-mode: vertical-rl` (垂直書寫) 的 CSS 屬性，將日期放在左側，標語放在右側。字體選用無襯線體（Helvetica/Arial），保持極簡現代感。

您可以試著用滑鼠在藍色區域慢慢劃過，感受那種寧靜的流動感。希望這個作品符合您心中「泡沫之境」的想像！"""),
            ],
        ),
        types.Content(
            role="user",
            parts=[
                types.Part.from_text(text="""請幫我把旁邊的文字內容、色彩，可以隨著每天不同的日期而改變，並在這個基礎上加入聲音，動態圖樣會根據當前的音量大小進行微幅的縮放"""),
            ],
        ),
        types.Content(
            role="model",
            parts=[
                types.Part.from_text(text="""**Defining the Objective**

I've initiated the process by meticulously analyzing the request. The primary goal is to revitalize the \"Land of Foam\" interactive webpage. I've broken down the project, starting with the core need: dynamic content that reacts to the day of the year, particularly the text and color scheme variations.


**Adding Audio Elements**

I'm now integrating audio! I'm planning a background sound/music component. The exciting part is the planned audio visualization: I'm making the visual elements, such as the blobs and foam, react dynamically to the volume of the audio, scaling and pulsing in response. I will be sure to keep the chill vibe and existing mouse interaction.


**Implementing Daily Vibes**

My focus has shifted to establishing distinct daily vibes; think Monday Blue versus Tuesday Energy, all while maintaining a consistent calm aesthetic. I'm exploring an HTML `<audio>` tag or a JavaScript `Audio` object. An essential UI component is the \"Start Experience\" button, given browser autoplay restrictions. The audio analysis requires the Web Audio API (`AudioContext`, `AnalyserNode`) and its data handling. I'm now implementing the framework in code.


**Refining Style and Data**

I'm now integrating dynamic CSS variables, like `--primary-color`, to streamline color updates from JavaScript. I've structured my JavaScript config using an array of `themes`, each holding color palettes and relevant text. The plan is to determine the theme index based on the date and then apply the styles and content accordingly. I will focus on a \"calm\" design.


**Generating Ambient Sound**

I'm now fully immersed in sound design! I'm moving away from an MP3 and building a custom ambient synth with three sine wave oscillators, slightly detuned to create a beating effect, a gain node, and a lowpass filter for a chill vibe. Also, I will refine daily themes: for example, Monday will be Deep Blue and Friday will be Sunset Orange. I'll need a HTML button for starting the experience.


**Implementing Audio-Driven Visuals**

I'm making progress. I'm leveraging `getByteFrequencyData` from the `AnalyserNode`, calculating an average volume. This average will dictate a scaling factor for the visual elements, such as particle radius. Currently, I am keeping an eye out for a smooth, appropriate animation response to the audio volume, not a jarring effect.


"""),
                types.Part.from_text(text="""這是一個非常棒的升級構想！將視覺、聽覺與時間維度結合，能創造出更具沈浸感的「數位禪意」體驗。

為了達成您的需求，我做了以下技術升級：

1.  **時間感知系統**：程式會讀取當前的「星期幾」，並根據每一天切換不同的**色票（Color Palette）**與**文字語錄**。
2.  **生成式環境音效 (Web Audio API)**：為了不依賴外部 MP3 檔案（可能會失效），我寫了一段即時生成的「雙路正弦波」環境音（Ambient Drone）。這是一種低頻、甚至帶有療癒感的嗡嗡聲，非常適合冥想。
3.  **音訊視覺化 (Audio Reactive)**：我使用了 `AnalyserNode` 來分析音量大小。當聲音產生波動時，畫面的泡沫半徑會隨之呼吸、縮放。

### 互動方式：
因為瀏覽器的安全限制，**聲音無法自動播放**。因此，畫面中央會有一個「**點擊進入泡沫之境**」的按鈕，點擊後才會啟動聲音與視覺特效。

您可以直接複製以下代碼並儲存為 HTML：

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang=\"zh-TW\">
<head>
    <meta charset=\"UTF-8\">
    <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\">
    <title>泡沫之境 | The Land of Foam</title>
    <style>
        /* 定義動態變數，讓 JS 可以輕鬆修改主題顏色 */
        :root {
            --bg-color: #f4f4f7;
            --text-color: #1a1a1a;
            --main-hues: #4169E1, #1E90FF, #6495ED; /* 預設藍色系 */
        }

        * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

        body, html {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            overflow: hidden;
            font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
            background-color: var(--bg-color);
            color: var(--text-color);
            transition: background-color 1s ease, color 1s ease;
        }

        /* --- 啟動遮罩 (Start Overlay) --- */
        #start-overlay {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0;
            width: 100%; height: 100%;
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
            z-index: 100;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            flex-direction: column;
            transition: opacity 0.8s ease;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        #start-overlay.hidden {
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
        }
        .start-btn {
            border: 1px solid #333;
            padding: 15px 40px;
            font-size: 1rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.2em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            background: transparent;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .start-btn:hover {
            background: #333;
            color: #fff;
        }

        /* --- 視覺層 --- */
        #canvas-container {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0;
            width: 100%; height: 100%;
            z-index: 1;
            /* 模糊濾鏡創造泡沫感 */
            filter: blur(60px) contrast(1.2); 
            opacity: 0.9;
        }

        .noise-overlay {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0;
            width: 100%; height: 100%;
            z-index: 2;
            pointer-events: none;
            opacity: 0.12;
            background-image: url(\"data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.85' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E\");
        }

        /* --- UI 文字層 --- */
        .ui-layer {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0;
            width: 100%; height: 100%;
            z-index: 3;
            padding: 2rem;
            pointer-events: none;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        /* 文字佈局 */
        .top-left { position: absolute; top: 2rem; left: 2rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.2rem; }
        .top-right { position: absolute; top: 2rem; right: 2rem; text-align: right; }
        .bottom-left { position: absolute; bottom: 2rem; left: 2rem; }
        .bottom-right { position: absolute; bottom: 2rem; right: 2rem; }

        /* 垂直文字 */
        .vertical-text-left {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%; left: 2rem;
            transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(-180deg);
            writing-mode: vertical-rl;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            opacity: 0.8;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
        }
        .vertical-text-right {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%; right: 2rem;
            transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(0deg);
            writing-mode: vertical-rl;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            opacity: 0.8;
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .ui-layer { padding: 1.5rem; }
            .top-left, .top-right, .bottom-left, .bottom-right { top: 1.5rem; left: 1.5rem; right: 1.5rem; bottom: 1.5rem; }
            .vertical-text-left, .vertical-text-right { display: none; }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <!-- 啟動按鈕 (因應瀏覽器音效政策) -->
    <div id=\"start-overlay\">
        <div style=\"margin-bottom: 20px; font-size: 0.8rem; color: #666;\">建議佩戴耳機體驗</div>
        <button class=\"start-btn\">Enter The Foam</button>
    </div>

    <!-- 畫布 -->
    <canvas id=\"canvas-container\"></canvas>
    <div class=\"noise-overlay\"></div>

    <!-- UI 文字 -->
    <main class=\"ui-layer\">
        <div class=\"top-left\">
            <span id=\"theme-name\">POSTTER</span>
            <span id=\"day-number\">32</span>
        </div>

        <div class=\"top-right\">
            <span id=\"dynamic-mood\">Today design</span>
        </div>

        <div class=\"vertical-text-left\" id=\"date-text\">
            OCTOBER / 19TH / 2025
        </div>

        <div class=\"vertical-text-right\" id=\"quote-text\">
            FREEWILL IDEA
        </div>

        <div class=\"bottom-left\">
            <span id=\"status-text\">Waiting for input...</span>
        </div>

        <div class=\"bottom-right\">
            <span>©Rising Moon</span>
        </div>
    </main>

    <script>
        // --- 設定：每日主題系統 ---
        const themes = [
            { day: \"Sunday\",    colors: [\"#B0C4DE\", \"#778899\", \"#E6E6FA\"], mood: \"Rest & Reset\",    quote: \"SILENCE IS GOLDEN\", bg: \"#f8f9fa\" },
            { day: \"Monday\",    colors: [\"#4169E1\", \"#1E90FF\", \"#6495ED\"], mood: \"Deep Focus\",      quote: \"START AGAIN\",       bg: \"#f4f4f7\" },
            { day: \"Tuesday\",   colors: [\"#2E8B57\", \"#3CB371\", \"#8FBC8F\"], mood: \"Growth Energy\",   quote: \"NATURE SPEAKS\",     bg: \"#f0f7f0\" },
            { day: \"Wednesday\", colors: [\"#FF7F50\", \"#FFA07A\", \"#FF6347\"], mood: \"Warm Balance\",    quote: \"MIDWEEK FLOW\",      bg: \"#fff5f2\" },
            { day: \"Thursday\",  colors: [\"#9370DB\", \"#8A2BE2\", \"#BA55D3\"], mood: \"Mystic Mind\",     quote: \"UNKOWN FUTURE\",     bg: \"#f6f0fa\" },
            { day: \"Friday\",    colors: [\"#FFD700\", \"#FFA500\", \"#F0E68C\"], mood: \"Golden Hour\",     quote: \"LET IT GO\",         bg: \"#fffff0\" },
            { day: \"Saturday\",  colors: [\"#483D8B\", \"#6A5ACD\", \"#7B68EE\"], mood: \"Midnight Calm\",   quote: \"DREAM SPACE\",       bg: \"#f0f0f5\" }
        ];

        // 取得今日資訊
        const today = new Date();
        const dayIndex = today.getDay(); // 0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday...
        const currentTheme = themes[dayIndex];

        // --- 1. 初始化頁面內容 ---
        function initTheme() {
            // 更新背景色
            document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--bg-color', currentTheme.bg);
            
            // 更新文字
            document.getElementById('theme-name').innerText = currentTheme.day.toUpperCase();
            document.getElementById('day-number').innerText = today.getDate().toString().padStart(2, '0');
            document.getElementById('dynamic-mood').innerText = currentTheme.mood;
            document.getElementById('quote-text').innerText = currentTheme.quote;

            // 格式化日期： MARCH / 02 / 2026
            const months = [\"JANUARY\", \"FEBRUARY\", \"MARCH\", \"APRIL\", \"MAY\", \"JUNE\", \"JULY\", \"AUGUST\", \"SEPTEMBER\", \"OCTOBER\", \"NOVEMBER\", \"DECEMBER\"];
            const dateStr = `${months[today.getMonth()]} / ${today.getDate()}TH / ${today.getFullYear()}`;
            document.getElementById('date-text').innerText = dateStr;
        }
        initTheme();

        // --- 2. 音訊系統 (Web Audio API) ---
        let audioCtx, analyser, dataArray;
        let isAudioPlaying = false;
        
        function setupAudio() {
            // 創建 AudioContext
            const AudioContext = window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext;
            audioCtx = new AudioContext();

            // 創建分析器 (用於視覺化)
            analyser = audioCtx.createAnalyser();
            analyser.fftSize = 64; // 不需要太細，只需抓大概音量
            dataArray = new Uint8Array(analyser.frequencyBinCount);

            // --- 生成式環境音 (Ambient Drone) ---
            // 創建三個振盪器產生和聲
            const osc1 = audioCtx.createOscillator();
            const osc2 = audioCtx.createOscillator();
            const osc3 = audioCtx.createOscillator();
            
            // 設定頻率 (低頻、冥想感)
            // 根據星期幾稍微改變基頻，讓聲音也有「每日感」
            const baseFreq = 180 + (dayIndex * 20); 
            osc1.frequency.value = baseFreq; 
            osc2.frequency.value = baseFreq * 1.5; // 5度音
            osc3.frequency.value = baseFreq * 0.5; // 低8度

            // 輕微去諧 (Detune) 創造波動感
            osc1.detune.value = -10;
            osc2.detune.value = 15;

            // 增益節點 (控制音量)
            const masterGain = audioCtx.createGain();
            masterGain.gain.value = 0.15; // 預設音量小一點，不刺耳

            // 連接線路: Oscillator -> Gain -> Analyser -> Speaker
            osc1.connect(masterGain);
            osc2.connect(masterGain);
            osc3.connect(masterGain);
            masterGain.connect(analyser);
            analyser.connect(audioCtx.destination); // 輸出到喇叭

            // 啟動聲音
            osc1.start();
            osc2.start();
            osc3.start();

            // 淡入效果
            masterGain.gain.setValueAtTime(0, audioCtx.currentTime);
            masterGain.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0.2, audioCtx.currentTime + 3);

            isAudioPlaying = true;
            document.getElementById('status-text').innerText = \"Sound On: Generative Drone\";
        }

        // --- 3. 視覺與互動邏輯 (Canvas) ---
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-container');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        let width, height;
        let particles = [];
        let mouse = { x: -1000, y: -1000 };
        let audioVolume = 0; // 用於縮放效果

        function resize() {
            width = window.innerWidth;
            height = window.innerHeight;
            canvas.width = width;
            canvas.height = height;
            initParticles();
        }
        window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
        window.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => { mouse.x = e.clientX; mouse.y = e.clientY; });

        class Particle {
            constructor() {
                this.x = Math.random() * width;
                this.y = Math.random() * height;
                this.baseRadius = Math.random() * 100 + 120;
                this.radius = this.baseRadius;
                this.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 1.0;
                this.vy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 1.0;
                
                // 從今日色票中隨機選色
                const colorSet = currentTheme.colors;
                this.color = colorSet[Math.floor(Math.random() * colorSet.length)];
            }

            update() {
                // 移動
                this.x += this.vx;
                this.y += this.vy;

                // 邊界反彈
                if (this.x < -150 || this.x > width + 150) this.vx *= -1;
                if (this.y < -150 || this.y > height + 150) this.vy *= -1;

                // --- 音訊反應邏輯 ---
                // audioVolume 範圍大約 0 ~ 255
                // 將其映射為縮放比例，例如 1.0 ~ 1.3
                const audioScale = 1 + (audioVolume / 255) * 0.4; 
                
                // --- 滑鼠互動邏輯 ---
                const dx = mouse.x - this.x;
                const dy = mouse.y - this.y;
                const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
                const interactDist = 400;

                // 目標半徑 = 基礎大小 * 聲音縮放
                let targetRadius = this.baseRadius * audioScale;

                if (dist < interactDist) {
                    const force = (interactDist - dist) / interactDist;
                    this.vx -= (dx / dist) * force * 0.08;
                    this.vy -= (dy / dist) * force * 0.08;
                    // 滑鼠靠近時，泡沫稍微變大
                    targetRadius += 20 * force;
                }

                // 平滑過渡半徑 (Lerp)
                this.radius += (targetRadius - this.radius) * 0.1;
            }

            draw() {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, this.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fillStyle = this.color;
                ctx.fill();
                ctx.closePath();
            }
        }

        function initParticles() {
            particles = [];
            const count = width < 768 ? 5 : 9;
            for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                particles.push(new Particle());
            }
        }

        function animate() {
            // 取得音頻數據
            if (isAudioPlaying && analyser) {
                analyser.getByteFrequencyData(dataArray);
                // 計算平均音量
                let sum = 0;
                for(let i = 0; i < dataArray.length; i++) sum += dataArray[i];
                audioVolume = sum / dataArray.length; // 更新全域音量變數
            }

            // 清除畫布 (保留殘影以製造流體感)
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15)'; // 這裡用白色有點太亮，改用透明
            // 為了配合背景色改變，這裡用簡單的 clearRect 配合 CSS 背景色即可
            // 如果想要拖影效果，要用當前的背景色
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);

            particles.forEach(p => {
                p.update();
                p.draw();
            });

            requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        }

        // --- 啟動邏輯 ---
        const startOverlay = document.getElementById('start-overlay');
        startOverlay.addEventListener('click', () => {
            startOverlay.classList.add('hidden');
            setupAudio(); // 啟動聲音
            document.getElementById('status-text').innerText = \"Playing...\";
        });

        // 開始
        resize();
        animate();

    </script>
</body>
</html>
```

### 新功能詳細說明

1.  **每日主題 (Daily Themes)**
    *   在 JavaScript 的 `themes` 陣列中，我定義了週日到週六的 7 種風格。
    *   **Monday (Blue)**: 為了工作專注。
    *   **Wednesday (Peach/Warm)**: 溫暖色調，平衡週間的疲憊。
    *   **Friday (Gold)**: 金色系，迎接週末的放鬆。
    *   網頁載入時會自動抓取 `new Date().getDay()`，您明天打開這個網頁，顏色和那句垂直的「語錄」就會不一樣。

2.  **聲音生成 (Generative Audio)**
    *   我沒有放入音樂檔案連結，而是用程式碼創造了一個「合成器」。
    *   它由三個不同頻率的聲波組成（基頻、五度音、低八度），並透過 `detune` 參數讓它們微微走音。這會產生一種自然的「拍頻（Beating）」，聽起來像是在洞穴或深海中的共鳴聲，非常平靜。
    *   **注意**：這段聲音是即時運算的，永遠不會重複。

3.  **聲音與視覺的連動 (Audio Reactivity)**
    *   程式碼中的 `analyser.getByteFrequencyData` 會以每秒 60 次的速度讀取當前的音量。
    *   在 `Particle.update()` 裡，我加入了一行數學公式：
        `const audioScale = 1 + (audioVolume / 255) * 0.4;`
    *   這意味著當合成器的聲音變大聲（或是波形震盪到高點）時，畫面上的圓球半徑會變大約 1.4 倍，創造出一種彷彿泡沫在隨著聲音「呼吸」的視覺效果。

現在，戴上耳機，點擊畫面中央的按鈕，享受這個專屬於當下的平靜空間吧。"""),
            ],
        ),
        types.Content(
            role="user",
            parts=[
                types.Part.from_text(text="""請幫我把右下角的rising moon改掉，改成主題名稱。
我想要另外加上一個點擊即可變色的功能，最好可以同時改變質感與動態效果，然後換上與之相配的音效。"""),
            ],
        ),
        types.Content(
            role="model",
            parts=[
                types.Part.from_text(text="""**Initiating Project Updates**

I'm starting by carefully analyzing the request. The primary goal is an update to an existing \"Land of Foam\" interactive webpage. So far, I've pinpointed one key content change: the text \"©Rising Moon\" needs modification in the bottom-right corner. This is my initial focus.


**Developing New Features**

I'm now diving into feature design. I've broken the new functionalities down. An index variable, `currentThemeIndex`, will drive the manual theme switching, replacing the daily auto-change logic. I'm brainstorming the visual and physics variations – thinking of themes like \"Neon/Cyber\" with high contrast and fast movement versus \"Ink/Zen\" with slow, trailing visuals. I need to make sure the audio changes with the visuals.


**Refining Effect Parameters**

I'm now zeroing in on the dynamic effect parameters. Specifically, I'm focusing on `speed`, `interactionRadius`, and `blendMode`, which are crucial for the physics engine. I'm considering specific CSS `mix-blend-mode` options for different textures. I'm also finalizing the audio types, and their parameters such as wave and frequency. I need to make sure the audio changes with the visuals.


**Implementing Theme Transitions**

I'm now implementing the theme transitions, focusing on CSS filters for each visual style (`.theme-neon`, `.theme-ink`). My JavaScript logic is evolving: the `themes` object now includes audio parameters (waveform, base frequency) and physics parameters (speed, bubble count). I'm developing the `updateAudio(theme)` function to smoothly ramp audio oscillators, avoiding clicks by ramping gain during transitions. The `updateTheme()` function, triggered by clicks, will update particle properties (color, speed).


**Finalizing The Visuals**

I'm now concretizing the themes: \"Neon\" uses purple, cyan, and pink with a sawtooth wave and `mix-blend-mode: screen`, while \"Ink\" uses black, white, and grey with a triangle wave. \"Ember\" uses red, orange, and dark colors with a square wave. I've determined that Foam, Ink, and Neon will have specific texture effects. Now I'm working out the best method for the audio.

I'm now drafting the implementation details in code format. Specifically, I'm working on methods to handle audio transitions using `audioCtx.currentTime` to ramp the frequency linearly, avoiding sharp cuts. I'm focusing on texture changes and their corresponding visual filters for each theme. Now I am building out the HTML/CSS, adding the click listener instructions, and initializing the JavaScript state management.


**Polishing Audio Implementation**

I'm now refining the audio. I've designed theme-specific sounds: \"Foam\" uses a low sine wave for depth, \"Forest (Day)\" uses a mid-range triangle wave for softness, and \"Sunset (Energy)\" uses a detuned sawtooth wave for richness, and I think that works well. I'm focusing on simplicity to maintain visual consistency.


"""),
                types.Part.from_text(text="""這是一個非常有趣的挑戰！我們要將網頁從單純的「時間感知」升級為「全感官互動體驗」。

為了達成您的需求，我進行了以下升級：
1.  **右下角文字更新**：已更換為主題名稱 \"©The Land of Foam\"。
2.  **點擊切換多重宇宙**：點擊畫面任意處，會切換不同的「境界」。
3.  **質感與物理變化**：
    *   **泡沫 (Foam)**：原版，極度模糊，緩慢流動。
    *   **水墨 (Ink)**：高對比，黑白色調，粒子會像墨汁一樣融合（Gooey Effect），移動緩慢且沈重。
    *   **霓虹 (Neon)**：高亮度，色彩鮮豔，粒子移動速度變快，並帶有「發光」的混色模式。
    *   **琥珀 (Amber)**：暖色調，粒子像火星一樣向上飄升。
4.  **動態音效合成**：不同的境界會即時改變合成器的「波形」與「頻率」。例如水墨模式聲音更低沈（三角波），霓虹模式聲音較銳利（鋸齒波）。

您可以直接複製以下代碼存為 HTML 體驗：

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang=\"zh-TW\">
<head>
    <meta charset=\"UTF-8\">
    <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\">
    <title>泡沫之境 | The Land of Foam</title>
    <style>
        :root {
            --bg-color: #f4f4f7;
            --text-color: #1a1a1a;
            --font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
        }

        * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

        body, html {
            width: 100%; height: 100%;
            overflow: hidden;
            font-family: var(--font-family);
            background-color: var(--bg-color);
            color: var(--text-color);
            /* 背景色切換時的平滑過渡 */
            transition: background-color 1.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 1.5s ease;
            cursor: pointer; /* 提示可點擊 */
        }

        /* --- 啟動遮罩 --- */
        #start-overlay {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0;
            width: 100%; height: 100%;
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95);
            z-index: 100;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            flex-direction: column;
            transition: opacity 0.8s ease;
        }
        #start-overlay.hidden { opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; }
        
        .start-btn {
            padding: 15px 40px;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.2em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            border: 1px solid #333;
            background: transparent;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: 0.3s;
        }
        .start-btn:hover { background: #333; color: #fff; }
        .hint-text { margin-top: 20px; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #888; letter-spacing: 0.05em;}

        /* --- 視覺層 (Canvas) --- */
        #canvas-container {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0;
            width: 100%; height: 100%;
            z-index: 1;
            /* 預設濾鏡，會隨 JS 改變 */
            filter: blur(60px) contrast(1.2); 
            transition: filter 1.5s ease; /* 濾鏡切換也要平滑 */
            opacity: 0.9;
        }

        /* 噪點層 */
        .noise-overlay {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0;
            width: 100%; height: 100%;
            z-index: 2;
            pointer-events: none;
            opacity: 0.12;
            background-image: url(\"data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.85' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E\");
        }

        /* --- UI 文字層 --- */
        .ui-layer {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0;
            width: 100%; height: 100%;

            padding: 2rem;
            pointer-events: none; /* 讓點擊穿透到 Body */
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .top-left { position: absolute; top: 2rem; left: 2rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.2rem; }
        .top-right { position: absolute; top: 2rem; right: 2rem; text-align: right; }
        .bottom-left { position: absolute; bottom: 2rem; left: 2rem; }
        .bottom-right { position: absolute; bottom: 2rem; right: 2rem; }
```
