<body class=\"mode-foam\">

    <div id=\"start-overlay\">
        <button id=\"enter-btn\" class=\"start-btn\">Enter The Foam</button>
        <div class=\"hint-text\">建議佩戴耳機 • 點擊進入</div>
        <div class=\"sub-hint\">請確保 foam.mp3, aura.mp3 等 5 個檔案已放入資料夾</div>
    </div>

    <audio id=\"main-audio\" loop></audio>

    <canvas id=\"canvas-container\"></canvas>
    
    <!-- 紋理層 -->
    <div class=\"texture-layer texture-ribbed\"></div>
    <div class=\"texture-layer texture-grit\"></div>
    <div class=\"texture-layer texture-rings\"></div>

    <main class=\"ui-layer\">
        <div class=\"top-left\">
            <span id=\"theme-index\">NO.01</span>
            <span id=\"mode-name\">FOAM</span>
        </div>
        <div class=\"top-right\">
            <span id=\"mood-text\">Over Nara</span>
            <div style=\"font-size: 0.7rem; opacity: 0.6; margin-top: 5px;\">Click to shift reality</div>
        </div>
        <div class=\"vertical-text-left\" id=\"date-text\"></div>
        <div class=\"vertical-text-right\" id=\"quote-text\">FREEWILL IDEA</div>
        <div class=\"bottom-left\">
            <span id=\"audio-status\" style=\"display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;\">
                Playing: <span id=\"song-name\">...</span>
                <div class=\"audio-wave\">
                    <div class=\"bar\"></div><div class=\"bar\"></div><div class=\"bar\"></div>
                </div>
            </span>
        </div>
        <div class=\"bottom-right\">
            <span>©The Land of Foam</span>
        </div>
    </main>

    <script>
        // --- 主題設定 (包含形狀定義) ---
        const themes = [
            {
                name: \"FOAM\", 
                id: \"NO.01\",
                class: \"mode-foam\",
                mood: \"Blue Silence\",
                songTitle: \"Monas - Over Nara\",
                audioSrc: \"foam.mp3\", 
                colors: [\"#4169E1\", \"#1E90FF\", \"#6495ED\", \"#B0C4DE\"],
                bg: \"#f4f4f7\",
                text: \"#1a1a1a\",
                visual: { speed: 0.8, filter: \"blur(60px) contrast(1.2)\", blend: \"normal\", gravity: 0 },
                shape: \"circle\" // 實心圓
            },
            {
                name: \"AMBER\", 
                id: \"NO.02\",
                class: \"mode-amber\",
                mood: \"Solar Energy\",
                songTitle: \"Light Music - Tree of Life\",
                audioSrc: \"amber.mp3\",
                colors: [\"#FF4500\", \"#FF6347\", \"#FFD700\", \"#FFF8DC\"], 
                bg: \"#FFFAF0\", 
                text: \"#CD5C5C\",
                visual: { speed: 0.6, filter: \"blur(40px) contrast(1.1) brightness(1.1)\", blend: \"multiply\", gravity: -0.3 },
                shape: \"triangle\" // 三角形 (面)
            },
            {
                name: \"NEON\", 
                id: \"NO.03\",
                class: \"mode-neon\",
                mood: \"Digital Rain\",
                songTitle: \"CFL - Neon Tides\",
                audioSrc: \"neon.mp3\",
                colors: [\"#008B8B\", \"#B87333\", \"#000033\", \"#2F4F4F\", \"#D2691E\"],
                bg: \"#050505\", 
                text: \"#B87333\",
                visual: { speed: 1.5, filter: \"blur(30px) brightness(1.4) contrast(1.2)\", blend: \"color-dodge\", gravity: 0 },
                shape: \"line\" // 線條
            },
            {
                name: \"INK\", 
                id: \"NO.04\",
                class: \"mode-ink\",
                mood: \"Block Print\",
                songTitle: \"LofCosmos - Ink on Paper\",
                audioSrc: \"ink.mp3\",
                colors: [\"#000000\", \"#111111\", \"#FFFFFF\", \"#333333\"],
                bg: \"#808080\", 
                text: \"#000000\",
                visual: { speed: 0.4, filter: \"blur(25px) contrast(8) grayscale(1)\", blend: \"normal\", gravity: 0.1 },
                shape: \"rect\" // 矩形 (面/塊)
            },
            {
                name: \"AURA\", // 新增的綠色主題
                id: \"NO.05\",
                class: \"mode-aura\",
                mood: \"Inner State\",
                songTitle: \"Healing Frequencies\",
                audioSrc: \"aura.mp3\", // 請準備此檔案
                // 參考照片：淺綠、螢光綠、白、淡黃
                colors: [\"#98FB98\", \"#00FA9A\", \"#F0FFF0\", \"#ADFF2F\", \"#32CD32\"],
                bg: \"#e0ffe0\", // 極淡綠背景
                text: \"#2E8B57\", // 海綠色文字
                // 視覺：柔和模糊，疊加模式讓光暈更強
                visual: { speed: 0.5, filter: \"blur(50px) brightness(1.05)\", blend: \"screen\", gravity: 0 },
                shape: \"ring\" // 空心圓/環 (呼應照片中的同心圓)
            }
        ];

        let currentThemeIndex = 0;
        let currentTheme = themes[0];
        const audioElement = document.getElementById('main-audio');
        const enterBtn = document.getElementById('enter-btn');
        
        // 播放音樂
        function playThemeAudio(src) {
            let fadeOut = setInterval(() => {
                if(audioElement.volume > 0.05) {
                    audioElement.volume -= 0.05;
                } else {
                    clearInterval(fadeOut);
                    audioElement.src = src;
                    audioElement.play().catch(e => console.log(\"找不到檔案或等待互動\"));
                    
                    audioElement.volume = 0;
                    let fadeIn = setInterval(() => {
                        if(audioElement.volume < 0.8) {
                            audioElement.volume += 0.05;
                        } else {
                            clearInterval(fadeIn);
                        }
                    }, 50);
                }
            }, 50);
        }

        // --- 視覺系統 ---
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-container');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        let width, height;
        let particles = [];
        let mouse = { x: -1000, y: -1000 };
        let simTime = 0; 

        function resize() {
            width = window.innerWidth;
            height = window.innerHeight;
            canvas.width = width;
            canvas.height = height;
            initParticles();
        }

        class Particle {
            constructor() {
                this.reset();
                this.x = Math.random() * width;
                this.y = Math.random() * height;
                this.breathSpeed = 0.02 + Math.random() * 0.03; 
                this.breathOffset = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                
                // 旋轉角度 (給三角形或矩形用)
                this.angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                this.rotationSpeed = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02;
            }

            reset() {
                let sizeMod = 1;
                if (currentTheme.shape === \"rect\") sizeMod = 0.8; // 方塊小一點
                if (currentTheme.shape === \"line\") sizeMod = 2.0; // 線條長一點

                this.baseSize = (Math.random() * 80 + 100) * sizeMod;
                this.size = this.baseSize; // 用 size 統一代表半徑或寬度
                
                const spd = currentTheme.visual.speed;
                this.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * spd;
                this.vy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * spd;
                this.color = currentTheme.colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * currentTheme.colors.length)];
            }

            update() {
                this.vy += currentTheme.visual.gravity * 0.05;
                this.angle += this.rotationSpeed; // 持續旋轉

                // 特殊移動邏輯
                if (currentTheme.shape === \"line\") {
                    this.y += this.vy * 2; // 線條垂直移動快
                } else {
                    this.x += this.vx; this.y += this.vy;
                }

                // 邊界循環
                const margin = 200;
                if (this.x < -margin) this.x = width + margin;
                if (this.x > width + margin) this.x = -margin;
                if (this.y < -margin) this.y = height + margin;
                if (this.y > height + margin) this.y = -margin;

                // 呼吸效果
                let breath = Math.sin(simTime * this.breathSpeed + this.breathOffset) * 0.15;
                let reactScale = 1 + breath;
                let targetSize = this.baseSize * reactScale;
                
                // 滑鼠互動
                const dx = mouse.x - this.x;
                const dy = mouse.y - this.y;
                const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
                if (dist < 400) {
                    const force = (400 - dist) / 400;
                    this.vx -= (dx / dist) * force * 0.1;
                    this.vy -= (dy / dist) * force * 0.1;
                    targetSize += 50 * force;
                }
                this.size += (targetSize - this.size) * 0.05;
            }

            draw() {
                ctx.fillStyle = this.color;
                ctx.strokeStyle = this.color;
                ctx.globalCompositeOperation = currentTheme.visual.blend;
                
                ctx.save();
                ctx.translate(this.x, this.y);
                ctx.rotate(this.angle); // 旋轉

                // --- 幾何圖形繪製邏輯 ---
                switch (currentTheme.shape) {
                    case \"circle\": // FOAM: 實心圓
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        ctx.arc(0, 0, this.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                        ctx.fill();
                        break;

                    case \"ring\": // AURA: 空心環 (綠色主題)
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        ctx.lineWidth = this.size * 0.2; // 環的粗細
                        ctx.arc(0, 0, this.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                        ctx.stroke();
                        // 畫第二個內圈
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        ctx.lineWidth = this.size * 0.1;
                        ctx.arc(0, 0, this.size * 0.6, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                        ctx.stroke();
                        break;

                    case \"triangle\": // AMBER: 三角形
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        const r = this.size;
                        ctx.moveTo(0, -r);
                        ctx.lineTo(r * 0.866, r * 0.5);
                        ctx.lineTo(-r * 0.866, r * 0.5);
                        ctx.closePath();
                        ctx.fill();
                        break;

                    case \"line\": // NEON: 光束/線條
                        const h = this.size * 2; // 高度
                        const w = this.size * 0.1; // 寬度 (細長)
                        ctx.shadowBlur = 20;
                        ctx.shadowColor = this.color;
                        ctx.fillRect(-w/2, -h/2, w, h);
                        break;

                    case \"rect\": // INK: 矩形色塊
                        const s = this.size * 1.5;
                        ctx.fillRect(-s/2, -s/2, s, s);
                        break;
                }

                ctx.restore();
                ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';
            }
        }

        function initParticles() {
            particles = [];
            // 根據形狀調整數量，線條需要多一點才好看
            let count = width < 768 ? 6 : 10;
            if (currentTheme.shape === \"line\") count *= 2;
            if (currentTheme.shape === \"rect\") count += 4;
            
            for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) particles.push(new Particle());
        }

        function animate() {
            simTime++;
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);
            particles.forEach(p => { p.update(); p.draw(); });
            requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        }

        function switchTheme() {
            currentThemeIndex = (currentThemeIndex + 1) % themes.length;
            currentTheme = themes[currentThemeIndex];

            document.body.className = currentTheme.class;
            document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--bg-color', currentTheme.bg);
            document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--text-color', currentTheme.text);
            document.getElementById('theme-index').innerText = currentTheme.id;
            document.getElementById('mode-name').innerText = currentTheme.name;
            document.getElementById('mood-text').innerText = currentTheme.mood;
            document.getElementById('song-name').innerText = currentTheme.songTitle;
            canvas.style.filter = currentTheme.visual.filter;

            playThemeAudio(currentTheme.audioSrc);
            
            // 重置粒子以適應新形狀
            initParticles();
        }

        enterBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            document.getElementById('start-overlay').classList.add('hidden');
            audioElement.src = currentTheme.audioSrc;
            audioElement.play().catch(e => {
                document.getElementById('song-name').innerText = \"(Check Files)\";
            });
            document.getElementById('song-name').innerText = currentTheme.songTitle;
            const d = new Date();
            const months = [\"JAN\", \"FEB\", \"MAR\", \"APR\", \"MAY\", \"JUN\", \"JUL\", \"AUG\", \"SEP\", \"OCT\", \"NOV\", \"DEC\"];
            document.getElementById('date-text').innerText = `${months[d.getMonth()]} / ${d.getDate()}TH / ${d.getFullYear()}`;
        });

        document.body.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (e.target.closest('#start-overlay')) return;
            switchTheme();
        });

        window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
        window.addEventListener('mousemove', e => { mouse.x = e.clientX; mouse.y = e.clientY; });

        resize();
        animate();

    </script>
</body>
</html>
```"""),
            ],
        ),
        types.Content(
            role="user",
            parts=[
                types.Part.from_text(text="""再給我一些意見，來精進這個網頁"""),
            ],
        ),
        types.Content(
            role="model",
            parts=[
                types.Part.from_text(text="""**Initiating Visual Exploration**

I'm currently focused on the core concept: \"The Land of Foam,\" a meditative, interactive web experience. My work centers on the visual foundation, specifically using HTML5 Canvas for particle effects and CSS for the overall aesthetic. I'm exploring blur and gradients to create a distinct feeling.


**Refining Themed Elements**

I've been adding more themes, working with specific noise textures, and tweaking color palettes for each (Foam, Amber, Neon, Ink, Aura). Interaction with the particles is driven by mouse movement, creating repulsion, with clicking triggering theme changes. I've also integrated local MP3 files to provide theme-specific audio and am focusing on minimalist text options. I recently added a new Aura theme with ring shapes and switched to local audio files to fix CORS problems.


**Prioritizing Smooth Transitions**

I'm now zeroing in on immediate theme transitions. A morphing effect, rather than a snap, would significantly smooth out the shifts between shapes and colors. Additionally, I am focusing on performance optimization of the canvas redraw. I am planning on animated text transitions, to improve the user experience. I am starting to implement the green aura theme with rotating or pulsing rings.

**Adding More Interactions**

I'm now thinking about scroll interaction, maybe parallax, and mobile device orientation (gyroscope) to move the bubbles. I am planning a click ripple effect for visual feedback. Finally, I'm considering code structure, thinking that while a monolithic HTML file is portable, it might need to be cleaner.


**Implementing Sensory Enhancements**

I'm now integrating ideas for an even more immersive experience. I'm focusing on smooth shape morphing, but may use a \"soft reset\" and CSS fade for simplicity. I'm also adding a CSS transition for text opacity and a mute button for audio accessibility. Finally, I'm thinking about visual feedback on clicks, like a ripple or flash.


**Integrating New Visual Effects**

I'm now incorporating smoother text transitions with CSS fade-in/fade-out animations to replace the current jarring changes. I'm also adding a mute toggle button, a simple UI element for audio control. Additionally, I'm developing an \"idle breathing\" mode for the interactive elements to create a more dynamic feel when there's no user activity, and I am adding a visual click ripple effect for theme switches. Finally, I'm refining the Aura theme, to include slow rotating green rings.


**Structuring Code For Clarity**

I'm now focusing on categorizing improvements: Interaction, Visuals, and Functionality. I'm prioritizing providing copy-pasteable code snippets for significant changes, and I'll clearly explain the reasoning behind each. However, I've had to make an adjustment. Implementing gyroscope functionality might be problematic because it requires HTTPS and iOS permission, so I've decided to prioritize touch support instead, mapping `touchmove` to `mousemove` for broader compatibility. I will also be focusing on text fade with CSS animations, a mute button for UI, and cursor idle behavior for auto-movement. Finally, I will double check the geometric shape drawing logic within the Canvas `draw` method, and will ensure file names are correct.


"""),
                types.Part.from_text(text="""這是一個非常出色的專案！目前您已經具備了視覺（Canvas粒子）、聽覺（本地音檔）、觸覺（滑鼠互動）以及多重主題（幾何與色彩）。

為了讓這個網頁從「像一個 Demo」進化成「完整的沈浸式藝術作品」，我建議從**使用者體驗細節 (UX)** 與 **視覺細節 (Polish)** 兩個方向進行精進。

以下是具體的建議與修改後的完整程式碼：

### 💡 精進建議方向

1.  **增加「靜音/播放」控制鈕**：
    *   **原因**：目前的設計是強制播放背景音。但在公共場合或使用者想聽自己音樂時，這會造成困擾。
    *   **作法**：在畫面角落增加一個優雅的喇叭圖示開關。

2.  **優化文字的過渡效果 (Text Transition)**：
    *   **原因**：目前切換主題時，文字是「瞬間」變換的，這稍微破壞了平靜的流動感。
    *   **作法**：讓文字在切換時先 `Fade Out` 再 `Fade In`，與背景的緩慢漸變同步。

3.  **手機觸控支援 (Mobile Touch)**：
    *   **原因**：目前的 `mousemove` 在手機上無法完美運作。
    *   **作法**：加入 `touchmove` 監聽，讓手機使用者手指滑過螢幕時也能推動氣泡。

4.  **待機時的自動漂浮 (Idle Animation)**：
    *   **原因**：如果使用者不碰滑鼠，畫面會只有單純的移動。
    *   **作法**：加入一個「虛擬游標」，當使用者停止操作 3 秒後，這個虛擬游標會自動在畫面中畫圓或波浪，主動與粒子互動，讓畫面永遠保持有機的變化。

---

### 🚀 最終升級版代碼 (包含上述所有功能)

請覆蓋原本的 HTML 檔案。我已加入靜音按鈕、觸控支援、文字淡入淡出動畫，以及自動導覽模式。

**⚠️ 請確認您的資料夾中已有：`foam.mp3`, `amber.mp3`, `neon.mp3`, `ink.mp3`, `aura.mp3` 這五個檔案。**

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang=\"zh-TW\">
<head>
    <meta charset=\"UTF-8\">
    <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no\">
    <title>泡沫之境 | The Land of Foam</title>
    <style>
        :root {
            --bg-color: #f4f4f7;
            --text-color: #1a1a1a;
            --font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
        }

        * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

        body, html {
            width: 100%; height: 100%;
            overflow: hidden;
            font-family: var(--font-family);
            background-color: var(--bg-color);
            color: var(--text-color);
            transition: background-color 1.5s ease, color 1.5s ease;
            cursor: pointer;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; /* 移除手機點擊藍框 */
        }

        /* --- 啟動畫面 --- */
        #start-overlay {
            position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0;
            width: 100%; height: 100%;
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.98);
            z-index: 100;
            display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; flex-direction: column;
            transition: opacity 0.8s ease;
        }
        #start-overlay.hidden { opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; }
        
        .start-btn {
            padding: 15px 40px; font-size: 0.9rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
            border: 1px solid #333; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: 0.3s;
        }
        .start-btn:hover { background: #333; color: #fff; }
        .hint-text { margin-top: 20px; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #888; letter-spacing: 0.05em;}
        .sub-hint { font-size: 0.7rem; color: #aaa; margin-top: 5px; }

        /* --- 視覺層 --- */
        #canvas-container {
            position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0;
            width: 100%; height: 100%;
            z-index: 1;
            transition: filter 2s ease;
            opacity: 0.9;
        }

        /* --- 紋理層 --- */
        .texture-layer {
            position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0;
            width: 100%; height: 100%;
            z-index: 2; pointer-events: none; opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 2s ease;
        }
        .texture-ribbed {
            background: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0px, transparent 2px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) 2px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 4px);
            background-size: 4px 100%;
            mix-blend-mode: overlay; 
        }
        .texture-grit {
            background-image: url(\"data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='1.5' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E\");
            mix-blend-mode: soft-light;
        }
        .texture-rings {
             background: radial-gradient(circle, transparent 20%, rgba(255,255,255,0.05) 21%, transparent 22%),
                         radial-gradient(circle, transparent 40%, rgba(0,0,0,0.03) 41%, transparent 42%);
             background-size: 100px 100px;
             mix-blend-mode: overlay;
        }

        body.mode-foam .texture-ribbed { opacity: 0; }
        body.mode-amber .texture-ribbed { opacity: 0.7; mix-blend-mode: overlay; }
        body.mode-neon .texture-ribbed { opacity: 0.5; mix-blend-mode: screen; }
        body.mode-ink .texture-grit { opacity: 0.6; }
        body.mode-ink .texture-ribbed { opacity: 0; }
        body.mode-aura .texture-rings { opacity: 0.8; }

        /* --- UI 層 --- */
        .ui-layer {
            position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: 3;
            padding: 2rem; pointer-events: none;
            font-size: 0.85rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; font-weight: 500;
        }
        
        /* 文字淡入淡出動畫 class */
        .fade-text {
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
            opacity: 1;
        }
        .fade-text.fading-out {
            opacity: 0;
        }

        .top-left { position: absolute; top: 2rem; left: 2rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.2rem; }
        .top-right { position: absolute; top: 2rem; right: 2rem; text-align: right; }
        .bottom-left { position: absolute; bottom: 2rem; left: 2rem; }
        .bottom-right { position: absolute; bottom: 2rem; right: 2rem; }
        
        .vertical-text-left {
            position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 2rem; transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(-180deg);
            writing-mode: vertical-rl; font-size: 0.75rem; opacity: 0.8; letter-spacing: 0.15em;
        }
        .vertical-text-right {
            position: absolute; top: 50%; right: 2rem; transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(0deg);
            writing-mode: vertical-rl; font-size: 0.75rem; opacity: 0.8;
        }

        /* 靜音按鈕 */
        #mute-btn {
            pointer-events: auto;
            cursor: pointer;
            opacity: 0.7;
            transition: opacity 0.3s;
            margin-right: 15px;
            font-size: 1.2rem;
        }
        #mute-btn:hover { opacity: 1; }

        /* 音量條動畫 */
        .audio-wave { display: inline-flex; align-items: flex-end; height: 12px; gap: 2px; }
        .bar { width: 3px; background-color: currentColor; animation: wave 1s infinite ease-in-out; }
        .bar:nth-child(1) { height: 40%; animation-delay: 0.0s; }
        .bar:nth-child(2) { height: 80%; animation-delay: 0.1s; }
        .bar:nth-child(3) { height: 50%; animation-delay: 0.2s; }
        /* 靜音時停止動畫 */
        .muted .bar { animation: none; height: 2px; }

        @keyframes wave { 0%, 100% { height: 40%; } 50% { height: 100%; } }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .ui-layer { padding: 1.5rem; }
            .top-left, .top-right, .bottom-left, .bottom-right { top: 1.5rem; left: 1.5rem; right: 1.5rem; bottom: 1.5rem; }
            .vertical-text-left, .vertical-text-right { display: none; }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class=\"mode-foam\">

    <div id=\"start-overlay\">
        <button id=\"enter-btn\" class=\"start-btn\">Enter The Foam</button>
        <div class=\"hint-text\">建議佩戴耳機 • 點擊進入</div>
        <div class=\"sub-hint\">請確保 foam.mp3, aura.mp3 等檔案已放入資料夾</div>
    </div>

    <audio id=\"main-audio\" loop></audio>

    <canvas id=\"canvas-container\"></canvas>
    
    <div class=\"texture-layer texture-ribbed\"></div>
    <div class=\"texture-layer texture-grit\"></div>
    <div class=\"texture-layer texture-rings\"></div>

    <main class=\"ui-layer\">
        <div class=\"top-left fade-text\" id=\"ui-top-left\">
            <span id=\"theme-index\">NO.01</span>
            <span id=\"mode-name\">FOAM</span>
        </div>
        <div class=\"top-right fade-text\" id=\"ui-top-right\">
            <span id=\"mood-text\">Over Nara</span>
            <div style=\"font-size: 0.7rem; opacity: 0.6; margin-top: 5px;\">Click to shift reality</div>
        </div>
        <div class=\"vertical-text-left fade-text\" id=\"date-text\"></div>
        <div class=\"vertical-text-right fade-text\" id=\"quote-text\">FREEWILL IDEA</div>
        <div class=\"bottom-left\">
            <span id=\"audio-status\" style=\"display:flex; align-items:center;\">
                <span id=\"mute-btn\">🔊</span>
                <span style=\"font-size: 0.8rem; margin-right: 8px;\">Playing:</span>
                <span id=\"song-name\" class=\"fade-text\" style=\"font-size: 0.8rem;\">...</span>
                <div class=\"audio-wave\" id=\"wave-anim\">
                    <div class=\"bar\"></div><div class=\"bar\"></div><div class=\"bar\"></div>
                </div>
            </span>
        </div>
        <div class=\"bottom-right\">
            <span>©The Land of Foam</span>
        </div>
    </main>

    <script>
        const themes = [
            {
                name: \"FOAM\", 
                id: \"NO.01\",
                class: \"mode-foam\",
                mood: \"Blue Silence\",
                songTitle: \"Over Nara\",
                audioSrc: \"foam.mp3\", 
                colors: [\"#4169E1\", \"#1E90FF\", \"#6495ED\", \"#B0C4DE\"],
                bg: \"#f4f4f7\",
                text: \"#1a1a1a\",
                visual: { speed: 0.8, filter: \"blur(60px) contrast(1.2)\", blend: \"normal\", gravity: 0 },
                shape: \"circle\"
            },
            {
                name: \"AMBER\", 
                id: \"NO.02\",
                class: \"mode-amber\",
                mood: \"Solar Energy\",
                songTitle: \"Tree of Life\",
                audioSrc: \"amber.mp3\",
                colors: [\"#FF4500\", \"#FF6347\", \"#FFD700\", \"#FFF8DC\"], 
                bg: \"#FFFAF0\", 
                text: \"#CD5C5C\",
                visual: { speed: 0.6, filter: \"blur(40px) contrast(1.1) brightness(1.1)\", blend: \"multiply\", gravity: -0.3 },
                shape: \"triangle\"
            },
            {
                name: \"NEON\", 
                id: \"NO.03\",
                class: \"mode-neon\",
                mood: \"Digital Rain\",
                songTitle: \"Neon Tides\",
                audioSrc: \"neon.mp3\",
                colors: [\"#008B8B\", \"#B87333\", \"#000033\", \"#2F4F4F\", \"#D2691E\"],
                bg: \"#050505\", 
                text: \"#B87333\",
                visual: { speed: 1.5, filter: \"blur(30px) brightness(1.4) contrast(1.2)\", blend: \"color-dodge\", gravity: 0 },
                shape: \"line\"
            },
            {
                name: \"INK\", 
                id: \"NO.04\",
                class: \"mode-ink\",
                mood: \"Block Print\",
                songTitle: \"Ink on Paper\",
                audioSrc: \"ink.mp3\",
                colors: [\"#000000\", \"#111111\", \"#FFFFFF\", \"#333333\"],
                bg: \"#808080\", 
                text: \"#000000\",
                visual: { speed: 0.4, filter: \"blur(25px) contrast(8) grayscale(1)\", blend: \"normal\", gravity: 0.1 },
                shape: \"rect\"
            },
            {
                name: \"AURA\", 
                id: \"NO.05\",
                class: \"mode-aura\",
                mood: \"Inner State\",
                songTitle: \"Healing Freq\",
                audioSrc: \"aura.mp3\", 
                colors: [\"#98FB98\", \"#00FA9A\", \"#F0FFF0\", \"#ADFF2F\", \"#32CD32\"],
                bg: \"#e0ffe0\", 
                text: \"#2E8B57\",
                visual: { speed: 0.5, filter: \"blur(50px) brightness(1.05)\", blend: \"screen\", gravity: 0 },
                shape: \"ring\"
            }
        ];

        let currentThemeIndex = 0;
        let currentTheme = themes[0];
        const audioElement = document.getElementById('main-audio');
        const enterBtn = document.getElementById('enter-btn');
        const muteBtn = document.getElementById('mute-btn');
        const waveAnim = document.getElementById('wave-anim');
        
        let isMuted = false;

        // 音樂播放邏輯
        function playThemeAudio(src) {
            let fadeOut = setInterval(() => {
                if(audioElement.volume > 0.05) {
                    audioElement.volume -= 0.05;
                } else {
                    clearInterval(fadeOut);
                    audioElement.src = src;
                    if(!isMuted) {
                        audioElement.play().catch(e => console.log(\"Audio waiting\"));
                        audioElement.volume = 0;
                        let fadeIn = setInterval(() => {
                            if(audioElement.volume < 0.8) {
                                audioElement.volume += 0.05;
                            } else {
                                clearInterval(fadeIn);
                            }
                        }, 50);
                    }
                }
            }, 50);
        }

        // 靜音切換
        muteBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            e.stopPropagation(); // 防止觸發背景切換
            isMuted = !isMuted;
            if(isMuted) {
                audioElement.pause();
                muteBtn.innerText = \"🔇\";
                waveAnim.classList.add('muted');
            } else {
                audioElement.play();
                muteBtn.innerText = \"🔊\";
                waveAnim.classList.remove('muted');
            }
        });

        // --- Canvas 視覺 ---
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-container');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        let width, height;
        let particles = [];
        
        // 滑鼠與自動導航系統
        let mouse = { x: -1000, y: -1000, isActive: false };
        let autoMouse = { x: 0, y: 0, angle: 0 }; // 自動游標
        let lastMouseMoveTime = 0;
        let simTime = 0; 

        function resize() {
            width = window.innerWidth;
            height = window.innerHeight;
            canvas.width = width;
            canvas.height = height;
            initParticles();
        }

        class Particle {
            constructor() {
                this.reset();
                this.x = Math.random() * width;
                this.y = Math.random() * height;
                this.breathSpeed = 0.02 + Math.random() * 0.03; 
                this.breathOffset = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                this.angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                this.rotationSpeed = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02;
            }

            reset() {
                let sizeMod = 1;
                if (currentTheme.shape === \"rect\") sizeMod = 0.8; 
                if (currentTheme.shape === \"line\") sizeMod = 2.0; 

                this.baseSize = (Math.random() * 80 + 100) * sizeMod;
                this.size = this.baseSize;
                
                const spd = currentTheme.visual.speed;
                this.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * spd;
                this.vy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * spd;
                this.color = currentTheme.colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * currentTheme.colors.length)];
            }

            update() {
                this.vy += currentTheme.visual.gravity * 0.05;
                this.angle += this.rotationSpeed;

                if (currentTheme.shape === \"line\") {
                    this.y += this.vy * 2; 
                } else {
                    this.x += this.vx; this.y += this.vy;
                }

                const margin = 200;
                if (this.x < -margin) this.x = width + margin;
                if (this.x > width + margin) this.x = -margin;
                if (this.y < -margin) this.y = height + margin;
                if (this.y > height + margin) this.y = -margin;

                let breath = Math.sin(simTime * this.breathSpeed + this.breathOffset) * 0.15;
                let reactScale = 1 + breath;
                let targetSize = this.baseSize * reactScale;
                
                // --- 互動邏輯 (滑鼠優先，否則使用自動游標) ---
                let interactX = mouse.isActive ? mouse.x : autoMouse.x;
                let interactY = mouse.isActive ? mouse.y : autoMouse.y;
                let interactStrength = mouse.isActive ? 400 : 600; // 自動模式下影響範圍更大

                const dx = interactX - this.x;
                const dy = interactY - this.y;
                const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
                
                if (dist < interactStrength) {
                    const force = (interactStrength - dist) / interactStrength;
                    // 推力稍微輕一點，比較優雅
                    this.vx -= (dx / dist) * force * 0.08;
                    this.vy -= (dy / dist) * force * 0.08;
                    targetSize += 50 * force;
                }
                this.size += (targetSize - this.size) * 0.05;
            }

            draw() {
                ctx.fillStyle = this.color;
                ctx.strokeStyle = this.color;
                ctx.globalCompositeOperation = currentTheme.visual.blend;
                
                ctx.save();
                ctx.translate(this.x, this.y);
                ctx.rotate(this.angle); 

                switch (currentTheme.shape) {
                    case \"circle\": 
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        ctx.arc(0, 0, this.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                        ctx.fill();
                        break;
                    case \"ring\": 
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        ctx.lineWidth = this.size * 0.2; 
                        ctx.arc(0, 0, this.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                        ctx.stroke();
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        ctx.lineWidth = this.size * 0.1;
                        ctx.arc(0, 0, this.size * 0.6, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                        ctx.stroke();
                        break;
                    case \"triangle\": 
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        const r = this.size;
                        ctx.moveTo(0, -r);
                        ctx.lineTo(r * 0.866, r * 0.5);
                        ctx.lineTo(-r * 0.866, r * 0.5);
                        ctx.closePath();
                        ctx.fill();
                        break;
                    case \"line\": 
                        const h = this.size * 2; 
                        const w = this.size * 0.1; 
                        ctx.shadowBlur = 20;
                        ctx.shadowColor = this.color;
                        ctx.fillRect(-w/2, -h/2, w, h);
                        break;
                    case \"rect\": 
                        const s = this.size * 1.5;
                        ctx.fillRect(-s/2, -s/2, s, s);
                        break;
                }
                ctx.restore();
                ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';
            }
        }

        function initParticles() {
            particles = [];
            let count = width < 768 ? 6 : 10;
            if (currentTheme.shape === \"line\") count *= 1.5;
            if (currentTheme.shape === \"rect\") count += 4;
            for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) particles.push(new Particle());
        }

        function updateAutoMouse() {
            // 自動游標繞8字形運動
            autoMouse.angle += 0.01;
            autoMouse.x = width/2 + Math.cos(autoMouse.angle) * (width * 0.3);
            autoMouse.y = height/2 + Math.sin(autoMouse.angle * 2) * (height * 0.2);
            
            // 檢查滑鼠是否閒置
            if (Date.now() - lastMouseMoveTime > 3000) {
                mouse.isActive = false;
            } else {
                mouse.isActive = true;
            }
        }

        function animate() {
            simTime++;
            updateAutoMouse();
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);
            particles.forEach(p => { p.update(); p.draw(); });
            requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        }

        // --- 介面更新邏輯 ---
        function updateUI() {
            // 取得所有需要變更文字的元素
            const elements = [
                document.getElementById('theme-index'),
                document.getElementById('mode-name'),
                document.getElementById('mood-text'),
                document.getElementById('song-name')
            ];

            // 1. Fade Out
            elements.forEach(el => el.parentElement.classList.add('fading-out'));
            if(document.getElementById('song-name')) document.getElementById('song-name').classList.add('fading-out');

            // 2. Wait, Change Content, Fade In
            setTimeout(() => {
                document.getElementById('theme-index').innerText = currentTheme.id;
                document.getElementById('mode-name').innerText = currentTheme.name;
                document.getElementById('mood-text').innerText = currentTheme.mood;
                document.getElementById('song-name').innerText = currentTheme.songTitle;

                elements.forEach(el => el.parentElement.classList.remove('fading-out'));
                if(document.getElementById('song-name')) document.getElementById('song-name').classList.remove('fading-out');
            }, 500); // 配合 CSS transition 0.5s
        }

        function switchTheme() {
            currentThemeIndex = (currentThemeIndex + 1) % themes.length;
            currentTheme = themes[currentThemeIndex];

            document.body.className = currentTheme.class;
            document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--bg-color', currentTheme.bg);
            document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--text-color', currentTheme.text);
            
            canvas.style.filter = currentTheme.visual.filter;
            
            updateUI();
            playThemeAudio(currentTheme.audioSrc);
            
            // 使用 setTimeout 稍微延遲粒子重置，讓顏色過渡更自然
            setTimeout(() => {
                initParticles();
            }, 200);
        }

        // 啟動
        enterBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            document.getElementById('start-overlay').classList.add('hidden');
            audioElement.src = currentTheme.audioSrc;
            audioElement.play().catch(e => {
                document.getElementById('song-name').innerText = \"(Check Files)\";
            });
            document.getElementById('song-name').innerText = currentTheme.songTitle;
            const d = new Date();
            const months = [\"JAN\", \"FEB\", \"MAR\", \"APR\", \"MAY\", \"JUN\", \"JUL\", \"AUG\", \"SEP\", \"OCT\", \"NOV\", \"DEC\"];
            document.getElementById('date-text').innerText = `${months[d.getMonth()]} / ${d.getDate()}TH / ${d.getFullYear()}`;
            
            lastMouseMoveTime = Date.now(); // 避免一開始就進入自動模式
        });

        document.body.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (e.target.closest('#start-overlay') || e.target.closest('#mute-btn')) return;
            switchTheme();
        });

        // 監聽滑鼠與觸控
        const handleMove = (x, y) => {
            mouse.x = x;
            mouse.y = y;
            lastMouseMoveTime = Date.now();
        };

        window.addEventListener('mousemove', e => handleMove(e.clientX, e.clientY));
        window.addEventListener('touchmove', e => {
            handleMove(e.touches[0].clientX, e.touches[0].clientY);
        }, {passive: true});

        window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

        resize();
        animate();

    </script>
</body>
</html>
```"""),
            ],
        ),
        types.Content(
            role="user",
            parts=[
                types.Part.from_text(text="""靜音/播放 刪掉，音樂後面的三條波動的線再把它設計得稍微偏右一點，不然會很擠"""),
            ],
        ),
        types.Content(
            role="model",
            parts=[
                types.Part.from_text(text="""**Refining the Interface**

I've decided to eliminate the \"Mute/Play\" button completely. In addition, I'm now working on repositioning the audio visualizer; I feel it's currently causing a bit of visual clutter. I'm focusing on finding a placement that integrates better with the interface.


**Adjusting Visual Placement**

Okay, I'm now implementing the margin adjustments. The plan is to push the audio visualizer, a visual wave element, slightly to the right to reduce visual clutter. I'll modify the `margin-left` or `gap` within the flex container of the `.audio-wave` class. Also, the mute button is gone now, so I'm paying special attention to alignment to create a clean visual appearance.


**Streamlining JavaScript Operations**

I'm now deep in the JavaScript adjustments. I've removed all references to the mute button and its associated logic, including the event listener and the `isMuted` variable. The autoplay functionality will remain within the `playThemeAudio` function. I am also planning to move all the inline styles to the css file, especially regarding the audio wave position.


**Implementing Visual Tweaks**

I'm now implementing the margin adjustments, specifically `margin-left: 12px` to the `.audio-wave` class. This provides space between the song name and the wave element, as requested. The text is shifting left due to the mute button's removal. I am making it more right, to fix this.


**Optimizing Visual Flow**

I'm now streamlining the visual flow, focusing on the spacing between elements. I'm ensuring there's clear separation between the \"Playing:\" label, the song name, and the audio wave. The \"too crowded\" feedback has led me to meticulously check for any lingering mute logic artifacts. Specifically, I removed the `if(!isMuted)` check, so audio should play consistently now.


"""),
                types.Part.from_text(text="""沒問題，我已經依照您的指示進行了調整：

1.  **移除靜音按鈕**：介面左下角現在更加簡潔，只保留播放資訊。
2.  **調整波動線條位置**：將三條跳動的音頻線往右推了 `15px`，並增加了線條之間的間距，讓整體視覺不再擁擠，更有呼吸感。

以下是修改後的完整程式碼，請直接覆蓋儲存即可：

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang=\"zh-TW\">
<head>
    <meta charset=\"UTF-8\">
    <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no\">
    <title>泡沫之境 | The Land of Foam</title>
    <style>
        :root {
            --bg-color: #f4f4f7;
            --text-color: #1a1a1a;
            --font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
        }

        * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

        body, html {
            width: 100%; height: 100%;
            overflow: hidden;
            font-family: var(--font-family);
            background-color: var(--bg-color);
            color: var(--text-color);
            transition: background-color 1.5s ease, color 1.5s ease;
            cursor: pointer;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
        }

        /* --- 啟動畫面 --- */
        #start-overlay {
            position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0;
            width: 100%; height: 100%;
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.98);
            z-index: 100;
            display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; flex-direction: column;
            transition: opacity 0.8s ease;
        }
        #start-overlay.hidden { opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; }
        
        .start-btn {
            padding: 15px 40px; font-size: 0.9rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
            border: 1px solid #333; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: 0.3s;
        }
        .start-btn:hover { background: #333; color: #fff; }
        .hint-text { margin-top: 20px; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #888; letter-spacing: 0.05em;}
        .sub-hint { font-size: 0.7rem; color: #aaa; margin-top: 5px; }

        /* --- 視覺層 --- */
        #canvas-container {
            position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0;
            width: 100%; height: 100%;
            z-index: 1;
            transition: filter 2s ease;
            opacity: 0.9;
        }

        /* --- 紋理層 --- */
        .texture-layer {
            position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0;
            width: 100%; height: 100%;
            z-index: 2; pointer-events: none; opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 2s ease;
        }
        .texture-ribbed {
            background: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0px, transparent 2px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) 2px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 4px);
            background-size: 4px 100%;
            mix-blend-mode: overlay; 
        }
        .texture-grit {
            background-image: url(\"data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='1.5' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E\");
            mix-blend-mode: soft-light;
        }
        .texture-rings {
             background: radial-gradient(circle, transparent 20%, rgba(255,255,255,0.05) 21%, transparent 22%),
                         radial-gradient(circle, transparent 40%, rgba(0,0,0,0.03) 41%, transparent 42%);
             background-size: 100px 100px;
             mix-blend-mode: overlay;
        }

        body.mode-foam .texture-ribbed { opacity: 0; }
        body.mode-amber .texture-ribbed { opacity: 0.7; mix-blend-mode: overlay; }
        body.mode-neon .texture-ribbed { opacity: 0.5; mix-blend-mode: screen; }
        body.mode-ink .texture-grit { opacity: 0.6; }
        body.mode-ink .texture-ribbed { opacity: 0; }
        body.mode-aura .texture-rings { opacity: 0.8; }

        /* --- UI 層 --- */
        .ui-layer {
            position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: 3;
            padding: 2rem; pointer-events: none;
            font-size: 0.85rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; font-weight: 500;
        }
        
        /* 文字淡入淡出動畫 */
        .fade-text {
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
            opacity: 1;
        }
        .fade-text.fading-out {
            opacity: 0;
        }

        .top-left { position: absolute; top: 2rem; left: 2rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.2rem; }
        .top-right { position: absolute; top: 2rem; right: 2rem; text-align: right; }
        .bottom-left { position: absolute; bottom: 2rem; left: 2rem; }
        .bottom-right { position: absolute; bottom: 2rem; right: 2rem; }
        
        .vertical-text-left {
            position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 2rem; transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(-180deg);
            writing-mode: vertical-rl; font-size: 0.75rem; opacity: 0.8; letter-spacing: 0.15em;
        }
        .vertical-text-right {
            position: absolute; top: 50%; right: 2rem; transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(0deg);
            writing-mode: vertical-rl; font-size: 0.75rem; opacity: 0.8;
        }

        /* 音量條動畫 */
        .audio-wave { 
            display: inline-flex; 
            align-items: flex-end; 
            height: 12px; 
            gap: 3px; /* 增加線條間距 */
            margin-left: 15px; /* 往右移，避免擁擠 */
        }
        .bar { width: 3px; background-color: currentColor; animation: wave 1s infinite ease-in-out; }
        .bar:nth-child(1) { height: 40%; animation-delay: 0.0s; }
        .bar:nth-child(2) { height: 80%; animation-delay: 0.1s; }
        .bar:nth-child(3) { height: 50%; animation-delay: 0.2s; }
        
        @keyframes wave { 0%, 100% { height: 40%; } 50% { height: 100%; } }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .ui-layer { padding: 1.5rem; }
            .top-left, .top-right, .bottom-left, .bottom-right { top: 1.5rem; left: 1.5rem; right: 1.5rem; bottom: 1.5rem; }
            .vertical-text-left, .vertical-text-right { display: none; }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class=\"mode-foam\">

    <div id=\"start-overlay\">
        <button id=\"enter-btn\" class=\"start-btn\">Enter The Foam</button>
        <div class=\"hint-text\">建議佩戴耳機 • 點擊進入</div>
        <div class=\"sub-hint\">請確保 foam.mp3, aura.mp3 等檔案已放入資料夾</div>
    </div>

    <audio id=\"main-audio\" loop></audio>

    <canvas id=\"canvas-container\"></canvas>
    
    <div class=\"texture-layer texture-ribbed\"></div>
    <div class=\"texture-layer texture-grit\"></div>
    <div class=\"texture-layer texture-rings\"></div>

    <main class=\"ui-layer\">
        <div class=\"top-left fade-text\" id=\"ui-top-left\">
            <span id=\"theme-index\">NO.01</span>
            <span id=\"mode-name\">FOAM</span>
        </div>
        <div class=\"top-right fade-text\" id=\"ui-top-right\">
            <span id=\"mood-text\">Over Nara</span>
            <div style=\"font-size: 0.7rem; opacity: 0.6; margin-top: 5px;\">Click to shift reality</div>
        </div>
        <div class=\"vertical-text-left fade-text\" id=\"date-text\"></div>
        <div class=\"vertical-text-right fade-text\" id=\"quote-text\">FREEWILL IDEA</div>
        
        <!-- 左下角播放狀態 -->
        <div class=\"bottom-left\">
            <span id=\"audio-status\" style=\"display:flex; align-items:center;\">
                <span style=\"font-size: 0.8rem; margin-right: 5px; opacity: 0.7;\">Playing:</span>
                <span id=\"song-name\" class=\"fade-text\" style=\"font-size: 0.8rem;\">...</span>
                <div class=\"audio-wave\" id=\"wave-anim\">
                    <div class=\"bar\"></div><div class=\"bar\"></div><div class=\"bar\"></div>
                </div>
            </span>
        </div>
        
        <div class=\"bottom-right\">
            <span>©The Land of Foam</span>
        </div>
    </main>

    <script>
        const themes = [
            {
                name: \"FOAM\", 
                id: \"NO.01\",
                class: \"mode-foam\",
                mood: \"Blue Silence\",
                songTitle: \"Over Nara\",
                audioSrc: \"foam.mp3\", 
                colors: [\"#4169E1\", \"#1E90FF\", \"#6495ED\", \"#B0C4DE\"],
                bg: \"#f4f4f7\",
                text: \"#1a1a1a\",
                visual: { speed: 0.8, filter: \"blur(60px) contrast(1.2)\", blend: \"normal\", gravity: 0 },
                shape: \"circle\"
            },
            {
                name: \"AMBER\", 
                id: \"NO.02\",
                class: \"mode-amber\",
                mood: \"Solar Energy\",
                songTitle: \"Tree of Life\",
                audioSrc: \"amber.mp3\",
                colors: [\"#FF4500\", \"#FF6347\", \"#FFD700\", \"#FFF8DC\"], 
                bg: \"#FFFAF0\", 
                text: \"#CD5C5C\",
                visual: { speed: 0.6, filter: \"blur(40px) contrast(1.1) brightness(1.1)\", blend: \"multiply\", gravity: -0.3 },
                shape: \"triangle\"
            },
            {
                name: \"NEON\", 
                id: \"NO.03\",
                class: \"mode-neon\",
                mood: \"Digital Rain\",
                songTitle: \"Neon Tides\",
                audioSrc: \"neon.mp3\",
                colors: [\"#008B8B\", \"#B87333\", \"#000033\", \"#2F4F4F\", \"#D2691E\"],
                bg: \"#050505\", 
                text: \"#B87333\",
                visual: { speed: 1.5, filter: \"blur(30px) brightness(1.4) contrast(1.2)\", blend: \"color-dodge\", gravity: 0 },
                shape: \"line\"
            },
            {
                name: \"INK\", 
                id: \"NO.04\",
                class: \"mode-ink\",
                mood: \"Block Print\",
                songTitle: \"Ink on Paper\",
                audioSrc: \"ink.mp3\",
                colors: [\"#000000\", \"#111111\", \"#FFFFFF\", \"#333333\"],
                bg: \"#808080\", 
                text: \"#000000\",
                visual: { speed: 0.4, filter: \"blur(25px) contrast(8) grayscale(1)\", blend: \"normal\", gravity: 0.1 },
                shape: \"rect\"
            },
            {
                name: \"AURA\", 
                id: \"NO.05\",
                class: \"mode-aura\",
                mood: \"Inner State\",
                songTitle: \"Healing Freq\",
                audioSrc: \"aura.mp3\", 
                colors: [\"#98FB98\", \"#00FA9A\", \"#F0FFF0\", \"#ADFF2F\", \"#32CD32\"],
                bg: \"#e0ffe0\", 
                text: \"#2E8B57\",
                visual: { speed: 0.5, filter: \"blur(50px) brightness(1.05)\", blend: \"screen\", gravity: 0 },
                shape: \"ring\"
            }
        ];

        let currentThemeIndex = 0;
        let currentTheme = themes[0];
        const audioElement = document.getElementById('main-audio');
        const enterBtn = document.getElementById('enter-btn');
        
        // 音樂播放邏輯
        function playThemeAudio(src) {
            let fadeOut = setInterval(() => {
                if(audioElement.volume > 0.05) {
                    audioElement.volume -= 0.05;
                } else {
                    clearInterval(fadeOut);
                    audioElement.src = src;
                    audioElement.play().catch(e => console.log(\"Audio waiting\"));
                    
                    audioElement.volume = 0;
                    let fadeIn = setInterval(() => {
                        if(audioElement.volume < 0.8) {
                            audioElement.volume += 0.05;
                        } else {
                            clearInterval(fadeIn);
                        }
                    }, 50);
                }
            }, 50);
        }

        // --- Canvas 視覺 ---
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-container');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        let width, height;
        let particles = [];
        
        // 滑鼠與自動導航系統
        let mouse = { x: -1000, y: -1000, isActive: false };
        let autoMouse = { x: 0, y: 0, angle: 0 }; 
        let lastMouseMoveTime = 0;
        let simTime = 0; 

        function resize() {
            width = window.innerWidth;
            height = window.innerHeight;
            canvas.width = width;
            canvas.height = height;
            initParticles();
        }

        class Particle {
            constructor() {
                this.reset();
                this.x = Math.random() * width;
                this.y = Math.random() * height;
                this.breathSpeed = 0.02 + Math.random() * 0.03; 
                this.breathOffset = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                this.angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                this.rotationSpeed = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02;
            }

            reset() {
                let sizeMod = 1;
                if (currentTheme.shape === \"rect\") sizeMod = 0.8; 
                if (currentTheme.shape === \"line\") sizeMod = 2.0; 

                this.baseSize = (Math.random() * 80 + 100) * sizeMod;
                this.size = this.baseSize;
                
                const spd = currentTheme.visual.speed;
                this.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * spd;
                this.vy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * spd;
                this.color = currentTheme.colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * currentTheme.colors.length)];
            }

            update() {
                this.vy += currentTheme.visual.gravity * 0.05;
                this.angle += this.rotationSpeed;

                if (currentTheme.shape === \"line\") {
                    this.y += this.vy * 2; 
                } else {
                    this.x += this.vx; this.y += this.vy;
                }

                const margin = 200;
                if (this.x < -margin) this.x = width + margin;
                if (this.x > width + margin) this.x = -margin;
                if (this.y < -margin) this.y = height + margin;
                if (this.y > height + margin) this.y = -margin;

                let breath = Math.sin(simTime * this.breathSpeed + this.breathOffset) * 0.15;
                let reactScale = 1 + breath;
                let targetSize = this.baseSize * reactScale;
                
                let interactX = mouse.isActive ? mouse.x : autoMouse.x;
                let interactY = mouse.isActive ? mouse.y : autoMouse.y;
                let interactStrength = mouse.isActive ? 400 : 600; 

                const dx = interactX - this.x;
                const dy = interactY - this.y;
                const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
                
                if (dist < interactStrength) {
                    const force = (interactStrength - dist) / interactStrength;
                    this.vx -= (dx / dist) * force * 0.08;
                    this.vy -= (dy / dist) * force * 0.08;
                    targetSize += 50 * force;
                }
                this.size += (targetSize - this.size) * 0.05;
            }

            draw() {
                ctx.fillStyle = this.color;
                ctx.strokeStyle = this.color;
                ctx.globalCompositeOperation = currentTheme.visual.blend;
                
                ctx.save();
                ctx.translate(this.x, this.y);
                ctx.rotate(this.angle); 

                switch (currentTheme.shape) {
                    case \"circle\": 
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        ctx.arc(0, 0, this.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                        ctx.fill();
                        break;
                    case \"ring\": 
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        ctx.lineWidth = this.size * 0.2; 
                        ctx.arc(0, 0, this.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                        ctx.stroke();
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        ctx.lineWidth = this.size * 0.1;
                        ctx.arc(0, 0, this.size * 0.6, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                        ctx.stroke();
                        break;
                    case \"triangle\": 
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        const r = this.size;
                        ctx.moveTo(0, -r);
                        ctx.lineTo(r * 0.866, r * 0.5);
                        ctx.lineTo(-r * 0.866, r * 0.5);
                        ctx.closePath();
                        ctx.fill();
                        break;
                    case \"line\": 
                        const h = this.size * 2; 
                        const w = this.size * 0.1; 
                        ctx.shadowBlur = 20;
                        ctx.shadowColor = this.color;
                        ctx.fillRect(-w/2, -h/2, w, h);
                        break;
                    case \"rect\": 
                        const s = this.size * 1.5;
                        ctx.fillRect(-s/2, -s/2, s, s);
                        break;
                }
                ctx.restore();
                ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';
            }
        }

        function initParticles() {
            particles = [];
            let count = width < 768 ? 6 : 10;
            if (currentTheme.shape === \"line\") count *= 1.5;
            if (currentTheme.shape === \"rect\") count += 4;
            for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) particles.push(new Particle());
        }

        function updateAutoMouse() {
            autoMouse.angle += 0.01;
            autoMouse.x = width/2 + Math.cos(autoMouse.angle) * (width * 0.3);
            autoMouse.y = height/2 + Math.sin(autoMouse.angle * 2) * (height * 0.2);
            
            if (Date.now() - lastMouseMoveTime > 3000) {
                mouse.isActive = false;
            } else {
                mouse.isActive = true;
            }
        }

        function animate() {
            simTime++;
            updateAutoMouse();
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);
            particles.forEach(p => { p.update(); p.draw(); });
            requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        }

        function updateUI() {
            const elements = [
                document.getElementById('theme-index'),
                document.getElementById('mode-name'),
                document.getElementById('mood-text'),
                document.getElementById('song-name')
            ];

            elements.forEach(el => el.parentElement.classList.add('fading-out'));
            if(document.getElementById('song-name')) document.getElementById('song-name').classList.add('fading-out');

            setTimeout(() => {
                document.getElementById('theme-index').innerText = currentTheme.id;
                document.getElementById('mode-name').innerText = currentTheme.name;
                document.getElementById('mood-text').innerText = currentTheme.mood;
                document.getElementById('song-name').innerText = currentTheme.songTitle;

                elements.forEach(el => el.parentElement.classList.remove('fading-out'));
                if(document.getElementById('song-name')) document.getElementById('song-name').classList.remove('fading-out');
            }, 500); 
        }

        function switchTheme() {
            currentThemeIndex = (currentThemeIndex + 1) % themes.length;
            currentTheme = themes[currentThemeIndex];

            document.body.className = currentTheme.class;
            document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--bg-color', currentTheme.bg);
            document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--text-color', currentTheme.text);
            
            canvas.style.filter = currentTheme.visual.filter;
            
            updateUI();
            playThemeAudio(currentTheme.audioSrc);
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                initParticles();
            }, 200);
        }

        // 啟動
        enterBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            document.getElementById('start-overlay').classList.add('hidden');
            audioElement.src = currentTheme.audioSrc;
            audioElement.play().catch(e => {
                document.getElementById('song-name').innerText = \"(Check Files)\";
            });
            document.getElementById('song-name').innerText = currentTheme.songTitle;
            const d = new Date();
            const months = [\"JAN\", \"FEB\", \"MAR\", \"APR\", \"MAY\", \"JUN\", \"JUL\", \"AUG\", \"SEP\", \"OCT\", \"NOV\", \"DEC\"];
            document.getElementById('date-text').innerText = `${months[d.getMonth()]} / ${d.getDate()}TH / ${d.getFullYear()}`;
            
            lastMouseMoveTime = Date.now(); 
        });

        document.body.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (e.target.closest('#start-overlay')) return;
            switchTheme();
        });

        const handleMove = (x, y) => {
            mouse.x = x;
            mouse.y = y;
            lastMouseMoveTime = Date.now();
        };

        window.addEventListener('mousemove', e => handleMove(e.clientX, e.clientY));
        window.addEventListener('touchmove', e => {
            handleMove(e.touches[0].clientX, e.touches[0].clientY);
        }, {passive: true});

        window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

        resize();
        animate();

    </script>
</body>
</html>
```"""),
            ],
        ),
        types.Content(
            role="user",
            parts=[
                types.Part.from_text(text="""INSERT_INPUT_HERE"""),
            ],
        ),
    ]
    tools = [
        types.Tool(googleSearch=types.GoogleSearch(
        )),
    ]
    generate_content_config = types.GenerateContentConfig(
        thinking_config=types.ThinkingConfig(
            thinking_level="HIGH",
        ),
        tools=tools,
    )

    for chunk in client.models.generate_content_stream(
        model=model,
        contents=contents,
        config=generate_content_config,
    ):
        print(chunk.text, end="")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    generate()


# To run this code you need to install the following dependencies:
# pip install google-genai

import os
from google import genai
from google.genai import types


def generate():
    client = genai.Client(
        api_key=os.environ.get("GEMINI_API_KEY"),
    )

    model = "gemini-3-flash-preview"
    contents = [
        types.Content(
            role="user",
            parts=[
                types.Part.from_bytes(
                    mime_type="image/png",
                    data=base64.b64decode(
                        """"""
                    ),
                ),
                types.Part.from_text(text="""請幫我修改啟動畫面的編排效果如範例，點擊進入後的所有程式碼無須更動，保持原樣即可。
完成修改後，請給我完整涵蓋所有的程式碼。

        const themes = [
            {

                shape: \"circle\"
            },

                name: \"AMBER\",

                class: \"mode-amber\",
                mood: \"Solar Energy\",
                songTitle: \"Tree of Life\",
