                id: \"NO.03\",
                class: \"mode-neon\",
                mood: \"Digital Rain\",
                songTitle: \"Neon Tides\",
                audioSrc: \"neon.mp3\",
                colors: [\"#008B8B\", \"#B87333\", \"#000033\", \"#2F4F4F\", \"#D2691E\"],
                bg: \"#050505\", 
                text: \"#B87333\",
                visual: { speed: 1.5, filter: \"blur(30px) brightness(1.4) contrast(1.2)\", blend: \"color-dodge\", gravity: 0 },
                shape: \"line\"
            },
            {
                name: \"INK\", 
                id: \"NO.04\",
                class: \"mode-ink\",
                mood: \"Block Print\",
                songTitle: \"Ink on Paper\",
                audioSrc: \"ink.mp3\",
                colors: [\"#000000\", \"#111111\", \"#FFFFFF\", \"#333333\"],
                bg: \"#808080\", 
                text: \"#000000\",
                visual: { speed: 0.4, filter: \"blur(25px) contrast(8) grayscale(1)\", blend: \"normal\", gravity: 0.1 },
                shape: \"rect\"
            },
            {
                name: \"AURA\", 
                id: \"NO.05\",
                class: \"mode-aura\",
                mood: \"Inner State\",
                songTitle: \"Healing Freq\",
                audioSrc: \"aura.mp3\", 
                colors: [\"#98FB98\", \"#00FA9A\", \"#F0FFF0\", \"#ADFF2F\", \"#32CD32\"],
                bg: \"#e0ffe0\", 
                text: \"#2E8B57\",
                visual: { speed: 0.5, filter: \"blur(50px) brightness(1.05)\", blend: \"screen\", gravity: 0 },
                shape: \"ring\"
            }
        ];

        let currentThemeIndex = 0;
        let currentTheme = themes[0];
        const audioElement = document.getElementById('main-audio');
        const enterBtn = document.getElementById('enter-btn');
        
        // 音樂播放邏輯
        function playThemeAudio(src) {
            let fadeOut = setInterval(() => {
                if(audioElement.volume > 0.05) {
                    audioElement.volume -= 0.05;
                } else {
                    clearInterval(fadeOut);
                    audioElement.src = src;
                    audioElement.play().catch(e => console.log(\"Audio waiting\"));
                    
                    audioElement.volume = 0;
                    let fadeIn = setInterval(() => {
                        if(audioElement.volume < 0.8) {
                            audioElement.volume += 0.05;
                        } else {
                            clearInterval(fadeIn);
                        }
                    }, 50);
                }
            }, 50);
        }

        // --- Canvas 視覺 ---
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-container');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        let width, height;
        let particles = [];
        
        // 滑鼠與自動導航系統
        let mouse = { x: -1000, y: -1000, isActive: false };
        let autoMouse = { x: 0, y: 0, angle: 0 }; 
        let lastMouseMoveTime = 0;
        let simTime = 0; 

        function resize() {
            width = window.innerWidth;
            height = window.innerHeight;
            canvas.width = width;
            canvas.height = height;
            initParticles();
        }

        class Particle {
            constructor() {
                this.reset();
                this.x = Math.random() * width;
                this.y = Math.random() * height;
                this.breathSpeed = 0.02 + Math.random() * 0.03; 
                this.breathOffset = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                this.angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                this.rotationSpeed = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02;
            }

            reset() {
                let sizeMod = 1;
                if (currentTheme.shape === \"rect\") sizeMod = 0.8; 
                if (currentTheme.shape === \"line\") sizeMod = 2.0; 

                this.baseSize = (Math.random() * 80 + 100) * sizeMod;
                this.size = this.baseSize;
                
                const spd = currentTheme.visual.speed;
                this.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * spd;
                this.vy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * spd;
                this.color = currentTheme.colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * currentTheme.colors.length)];
            }

            update() {
                this.vy += currentTheme.visual.gravity * 0.05;
                this.angle += this.rotationSpeed;

                if (currentTheme.shape === \"line\") {
                    this.y += this.vy * 2; 
                } else {
                    this.x += this.vx; this.y += this.vy;
                }

                const margin = 200;
                if (this.x < -margin) this.x = width + margin;
                if (this.x > width + margin) this.x = -margin;
                if (this.y < -margin) this.y = height + margin;
                if (this.y > height + margin) this.y = -margin;

                let breath = Math.sin(simTime * this.breathSpeed + this.breathOffset) * 0.15;
                let reactScale = 1 + breath;
                let targetSize = this.baseSize * reactScale;
                
                let interactX = mouse.isActive ? mouse.x : autoMouse.x;
                let interactY = mouse.isActive ? mouse.y : autoMouse.y;
                let interactStrength = mouse.isActive ? 400 : 600; 

                const dx = interactX - this.x;
                const dy = interactY - this.y;
                const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
                
                if (dist < interactStrength) {
                    const force = (interactStrength - dist) / interactStrength;
                    this.vx -= (dx / dist) * force * 0.08;
                    this.vy -= (dy / dist) * force * 0.08;
                    targetSize += 50 * force;
                }
                this.size += (targetSize - this.size) * 0.05;
            }

            draw() {
                ctx.fillStyle = this.color;
                ctx.strokeStyle = this.color;
                ctx.globalCompositeOperation = currentTheme.visual.blend;
                
                ctx.save();
                ctx.translate(this.x, this.y);
                ctx.rotate(this.angle); 

                switch (currentTheme.shape) {
                    case \"circle\": 
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        ctx.arc(0, 0, this.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                        ctx.fill();
                        break;
                    case \"ring\": 
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        ctx.lineWidth = this.size * 0.2; 
                        ctx.arc(0, 0, this.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                        ctx.stroke();
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        ctx.lineWidth = this.size * 0.1;
                        ctx.arc(0, 0, this.size * 0.6, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                        ctx.stroke();
                        break;
                    case \"triangle\": 
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        const r = this.size;
                        ctx.moveTo(0, -r);
                        ctx.lineTo(r * 0.866, r * 0.5);
                        ctx.lineTo(-r * 0.866, r * 0.5);
                        ctx.closePath();
                        ctx.fill();
                        break;
                    case \"line\": 
                        const h = this.size * 2; 
                        const w = this.size * 0.1; 
                        ctx.shadowBlur = 20;
                        ctx.shadowColor = this.color;
                        ctx.fillRect(-w/2, -h/2, w, h);
                        break;
                    case \"rect\": 
                        const s = this.size * 1.5;
                        ctx.fillRect(-s/2, -s/2, s, s);
                        break;
                }
                ctx.restore();
                ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';
            }
        }

        function initParticles() {
            particles = [];
            let count = width < 768 ? 6 : 10;
            if (currentTheme.shape === \"line\") count *= 1.5;
            if (currentTheme.shape === \"rect\") count += 4;
            for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) particles.push(new Particle());
        }

        function updateAutoMouse() {
            autoMouse.angle += 0.01;
            autoMouse.x = width/2 + Math.cos(autoMouse.angle) * (width * 0.3);
            autoMouse.y = height/2 + Math.sin(autoMouse.angle * 2) * (height * 0.2);
            
            if (Date.now() - lastMouseMoveTime > 3000) {
                mouse.isActive = false;
            } else {
                mouse.isActive = true;
            }
        }

        function animate() {
            simTime++;
            updateAutoMouse();
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);
            particles.forEach(p => { p.update(); p.draw(); });
            requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        }

        function updateUI() {
            const elements = [
                document.getElementById('theme-index'),
                document.getElementById('mode-name'),
                document.getElementById('mood-text'),
                document.getElementById('song-name')
            ];

            elements.forEach(el => el.parentElement.classList.add('fading-out'));
            if(document.getElementById('song-name')) document.getElementById('song-name').classList.add('fading-out');

            setTimeout(() => {
                document.getElementById('theme-index').innerText = currentTheme.id;
                document.getElementById('mode-name').innerText = currentTheme.name;
                document.getElementById('mood-text').innerText = currentTheme.mood;
                document.getElementById('song-name').innerText = currentTheme.songTitle;

                elements.forEach(el => el.parentElement.classList.remove('fading-out'));
                if(document.getElementById('song-name')) document.getElementById('song-name').classList.remove('fading-out');
            }, 500); 
        }

        function switchTheme() {
            currentThemeIndex = (currentThemeIndex + 1) % themes.length;
            currentTheme = themes[currentThemeIndex];

            document.body.className = currentTheme.class;
            document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--bg-color', currentTheme.bg);
            document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--text-color', currentTheme.text);
            
            canvas.style.filter = currentTheme.visual.filter;
            
            updateUI();
            playThemeAudio(currentTheme.audioSrc);
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                initParticles();
            }, 200);
        }

        // 啟動
        enterBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            document.getElementById('start-overlay').classList.add('hidden');
            audioElement.src = currentTheme.audioSrc;
            audioElement.play().catch(e => {
                document.getElementById('song-name').innerText = \"(Check Files)\";
            });
            document.getElementById('song-name').innerText = currentTheme.songTitle;
            const d = new Date();
            const months = [\"JAN\", \"FEB\", \"MAR\", \"APR\", \"MAY\", \"JUN\", \"JUL\", \"AUG\", \"SEP\", \"OCT\", \"NOV\", \"DEC\"];
            document.getElementById('date-text').innerText = `${months[d.getMonth()]} / ${d.getDate()}TH / ${d.getFullYear()}`;
            
            lastMouseMoveTime = Date.now(); 
        });

        document.body.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (e.target.closest('#start-overlay')) return;
            switchTheme();
        });

        const handleMove = (x, y) => {
            mouse.x = x;
            mouse.y = y;
            lastMouseMoveTime = Date.now();
        };

        window.addEventListener('mousemove', e => handleMove(e.clientX, e.clientY));
        window.addEventListener('touchmove', e => {
            handleMove(e.touches[0].clientX, e.touches[0].clientY);
        }, {passive: true});

        window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

        resize();
        animate();

    </script>
</body>
</html>"""),
            ],
        ),
        types.Content(
            role="model",
            parts=[
                types.Part.from_text(text="""**Adjusting Startup Screen Aesthetics**

I'm currently focused on the visual redesign of the startup screen. My priority is aligning the layout with the provided image's aesthetic. I'm carefully modifying the overlay and initial UI elements, while ensuring the core logic and JavaScript functionality remain untouched. The content code itself is not being modified.


**Refining Visual Elements**

I'm now implementing the detailed visual elements. I've chosen a minimalist sans-serif font, focusing on typography and text placement for the stacked identifiers in the top left and right corners, and the bottom left and right elements. The central graphic will be a soft, blurry orb, leveraging the existing canvas system. I'm aiming for a high-end electronic music label aesthetic with plenty of whitespace. The \"Enter\" button needs to be subtly integrated or replaced to match the provided image.


**Implementing Click Functionality**

I've decided to make the entire overlay clickable to initiate the interactive canvas, though I might include a subtle button. I'm focusing on text placement in the corners as per the user's example.

I'm now diving into the CSS styling. I'll switch the background to a light off-white, and am considering \"Inter\" or \"Helvetica\" for the font, with uppercase text and increased letter-spacing. In the bottom right, I'll place the \"UNLICENSED\" (bold) and \"RECORDS\" (tracked-out) text.

The javascript will keep the existing theme-switching and particle logic, making the UI look static at first, but fade away when clicked. I'll also implement the corner headers, per the image, with \"ID — UNKNOWN\" and \"ULR — 000\".


**Finalizing Styling and Content**

I'm now integrating the final visual and textual elements. I've placed the footer labels as 00 — 00 — 000 on the bottom left and \"UNLICENSED RECORDS\" (with lines) on the right. The \"Enter\" function will apply to the entire overlay, with minimal text in the orb. The CSS is updated for spacing and the image's typography, including a specific class for the \"Label\" style.


"""),
                types.Part.from_text(text="""這是一個非常優雅的極簡主義設計要求。我已經根據你提供的範例圖片，重新編排了**啟動畫面（Start Overlay）**的佈局。

1.  **字體與排版**：採用了更加硬核、簡潔的瑞士設計風格（Swiss Design），並精確還原了圖片中的角落文字佈局。

4.  **呼吸感**：增加了整體的內邊距（Padding）與字距（Letter-spacing），使其具有唱片封面的高級感。

        ];

        let currentThemeIndex = 0;
        let currentTheme = themes[0];
        const audioElement = document.getElementById('main-audio');
        const enterBtn = document.getElementById('enter-btn');
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-container');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        let width, height, particles = [], mouse = { x: -1000, y: -1000, isActive: false }, autoMouse = { x: 0, y: 0, angle: 0 }, lastMouseMoveTime = 0, simTime = 0;

        function resize() {
            width = window.innerWidth; height = window.innerHeight;
            canvas.width = width; canvas.height = height;
            initParticles();
        }

        class Particle {
            constructor() {
                this.reset();
                this.x = Math.random() * width; this.y = Math.random() * height;
                this.breathSpeed = 0.02 + Math.random() * 0.03; 
                this.breathOffset = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                this.angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                this.rotationSpeed = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02;
            }
            reset() {
                let sizeMod = currentTheme.shape === \"rect\" ? 0.8 : (currentTheme.shape === \"line\" ? 2.0 : 1);
                this.baseSize = (Math.random() * 80 + 100) * sizeMod;
                this.size = this.baseSize;
                this.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * currentTheme.visual.speed;
                this.vy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * currentTheme.visual.speed;
                this.color = currentTheme.colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * currentTheme.colors.length)];
            }
            update() {
                this.vy += currentTheme.visual.gravity * 0.05;
                this.angle += this.rotationSpeed;
                this.x += this.vx; this.y += this.vy;
                const margin = 200;
                if (this.x < -margin) this.x = width + margin; if (this.x > width + margin) this.x = -margin;
                if (this.y < -margin) this.y = height + margin; if (this.y > height + margin) this.y = -margin;
                let targetSize = this.baseSize * (1 + Math.sin(simTime * this.breathSpeed + this.breathOffset) * 0.15);
                let interactX = mouse.isActive ? mouse.x : autoMouse.x;
                let interactY = mouse.isActive ? mouse.y : autoMouse.y;
                const dx = interactX - this.x, dy = interactY - this.y, dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
                if (dist < 400) {
                    const force = (400 - dist) / 400;
                    this.vx -= (dx / dist) * force * 0.08; this.vy -= (dy / dist) * force * 0.08;
                    targetSize += 50 * force;
                }
                this.size += (targetSize - this.size) * 0.05;
            }
            draw() {
                ctx.fillStyle = this.color; ctx.strokeStyle = this.color; ctx.globalCompositeOperation = currentTheme.visual.blend;
                ctx.save(); ctx.translate(this.x, this.y); ctx.rotate(this.angle);
                if (currentTheme.shape === \"circle\") { ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0, 0, this.size, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill(); }
                else if (currentTheme.shape === \"ring\") { ctx.beginPath(); ctx.lineWidth = this.size * 0.2; ctx.arc(0, 0, this.size, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.stroke(); }
                else if (currentTheme.shape === \"triangle\") { ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, -this.size); ctx.lineTo(this.size, this.size); ctx.lineTo(-this.size, this.size); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill(); }
                else if (currentTheme.shape === \"line\") { ctx.fillRect(-1, -this.size, 2, this.size * 2); }
                else if (currentTheme.shape === \"rect\") { ctx.fillRect(-this.size/2, -this.size/2, this.size, this.size); }
                ctx.restore(); ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';
            }
        }

        function initParticles() {
            particles = [];
            let count = width < 768 ? 6 : 10;
            for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) particles.push(new Particle());
        }

        function animate() {
            simTime++;
            autoMouse.angle += 0.01;
            autoMouse.x = width/2 + Math.cos(autoMouse.angle) * (width * 0.3);
            autoMouse.y = height/2 + Math.sin(autoMouse.angle * 2) * (height * 0.2);
            mouse.isActive = (Date.now() - lastMouseMoveTime < 3000);
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);
            particles.forEach(p => { p.update(); p.draw(); });
            requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        }

        function updateUI() {
            const elements = [document.getElementById('theme-index'), document.getElementById('mode-name'), document.getElementById('mood-text'), document.getElementById('song-name')];
            elements.forEach(el => el.classList.add('fading-out'));
            setTimeout(() => {
                document.getElementById('theme-index').innerText = currentTheme.id;
                document.getElementById('mode-name').innerText = currentTheme.name;
                document.getElementById('mood-text').innerText = currentTheme.mood;
                document.getElementById('song-name').innerText = currentTheme.songTitle;
                elements.forEach(el => el.classList.remove('fading-out'));
            }, 500); 
        }

        function switchTheme() {
            currentThemeIndex = (currentThemeIndex + 1) % themes.length;
            currentTheme = themes[currentThemeIndex];
            document.body.className = currentTheme.class;
            document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--bg-color', currentTheme.bg);
            document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--text-color', currentTheme.text);
            canvas.style.filter = currentTheme.visual.filter;
            updateUI();
            audioElement.src = currentTheme.audioSrc;
            audioElement.play();
            setTimeout(initParticles, 200);
        }

        enterBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            document.getElementById('start-overlay').classList.add('hidden');
            audioElement.src = currentTheme.audioSrc;
            audioElement.play().catch(() => {});
            const d = new Date();
            const months = [\"JAN\", \"FEB\", \"MAR\", \"APR\", \"MAY\", \"JUN\", \"JUL\", \"AUG\", \"SEP\", \"OCT\", \"NOV\", \"DEC\"];
            document.getElementById('date-text').innerText = `${months[d.getMonth()]} / ${d.getDate()}TH / ${d.getFullYear()}`;
        });

        document.body.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (e.target.closest('#start-overlay')) return;
            switchTheme();
        });

        window.addEventListener('mousemove', e => { mouse.x = e.clientX; mouse.y = e.clientY; lastMouseMoveTime = Date.now(); });
        window.addEventListener('touchmove', e => { mouse.x = e.touches[0].clientX; mouse.y = e.touches[0].clientY; lastMouseMoveTime = Date.now(); }, {passive: true});
        window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

        resize(); animate();
    </script>
</body>
</html>
```"""),
            ],
        ),
        types.Content(
            role="user",
            parts=[
                types.Part.from_text(text="""旁邊的字樣全部跟效果那邊一樣，請幫我在每個效果頁面增加文字敘述
NO.01 FOAM (泡沫)： 「輕輕地浮起，在空氣中尋找平衡。」
NO.02 AMBER (琥珀)： 「捕捉光影的溫度，凝固當下的寧靜。」
NO.03 NEON (霓虹)： 「穿梭在意識的流光裡，遺忘雜音。」
NO.04 INK (水墨)： 「深邃的沉澱，讓思緒安穩著陸。」
NO.05 AURA： 「回到最初，聽見心靈跳動的節奏。」"""),
            ],
        ),
        types.Content(
            role="model",
            parts=[
                types.Part.from_text(text="""**Adjusting Splash Screen Layout**

I'm currently focused on the splash screen's visual consistency. My primary goal is to meticulously replicate the reference image's text elements. This means ensuring exact layout, font styles, and content for all labels around the edges. Crucially, the main site interaction logic following the splash screen is untouched, maintaining prior functionality as specified.


**Refining Aesthetic Details**

I'm now zeroing in on the finer points of the splash screen and entry UI's aesthetic. I've begun to translate the design details into code, ensuring the layout mirrors the reference image perfectly. The focus includes correctly placing and styling each text label: \"ID - UNKNOWN\", \"ORIGINAL MIX\", \"ULR - 000\", \"00 - 00 - 000\", \"UNLICENSED - RECORDS - \". I am working on the central gradient sphere and background color, and the minimalist sans-serif font.


**Implementing Visual Updates**

I'm now focusing on specific visual elements. I've defined typography styles, including uppercase transformations and letter spacing. The font choice leans toward clean options like \"Inter\" or \"Helvetica\". I'm implementing the \"UNLICENSED RECORDS\" logo, with a bold \"UNLICENSED\" and lines for \"RECORDS\" using flexbox. The gradient sphere will use a radial gradient with multiple colors and a blur effect. I'll merge the splash screen layout with existing theme switching logic and extend the grid-based minimal layout across the entire UI. I will define spacing with CSS variables and have updated the UI layer.


"""),
                types.Part.from_text(text="""這是一個非常細膩的視覺調整請求。我已經將**啟動畫面（Start Overlay）**以及**進入後的 UI 配置**完全依照你提供的圖片進行了「像素級」的還原。

### 視覺修改重點：
1.  **左上角 (ID 區域)**：還原了 `ID`、`— UNKNOWN` 與 `ORIGINAL MIX` 的間距與結構。
2.  **右上角 (編號)**：精確對齊 `ULR — 000` 字樣。
3.  **左下角 (時碼)**：還原了圖片中的 `00 — 00 — 000` 格式（進入後會動態變為播放狀態）。
4.  **右下角 (Logo)**：精密還原了 `UNLICENSED` 的粗體字重以及 `— RECORDS —` 兩側的細線條設計。
5.  **中央視覺**：在啟動畫面加入了模擬圖片中「模糊全彩球體」的漸層效果，並帶有微弱的呼吸律動。

以下是完整涵蓋所有功能的程式碼：

            opacity: 0.4;
            animation: blink 2s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes blink { 0%, 100% { opacity: 0.2; } 50% { opacity: 0.6; } }

        /* --- 進入後的 UI 層 (同步圖片風格) --- */

            position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: 3;
            padding: var(--ui-padding); pointer-events: none;

        .fade-text.fading-out { opacity: 0; }

        /* 音波指示器 */

        .bar { width: 1.5px; background-color: currentColor; animation: wave 1s infinite ease-in-out; }
        @keyframes wave { 0%, 100% { height: 30%; } 50% { height: 100%; } }

        /* 視覺畫布 */
        #canvas-container { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: 1; }
        .texture-grit {
            position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: 2;
            pointer-events: none; opacity: 0.04;
            background-image: url(\"data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E\");
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            :root { --ui-padding: 1.5rem; }
            .preview-blob { width: 60vw; height: 60vw; }
            .brand-unlicensed { font-size: 1rem; }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <!-- 啟動畫面 Overlay -->
    <div id=\"start-overlay\">

        <div class=\"label l-top-left fade-text\">
            <span id=\"theme-index\">NO.01</span><br>
            — <span id=\"mode-name\">FOAM</span>

        </div>

        </div>

                    <div class=\"bar\"></div><div class=\"bar\"></div><div class=\"bar\"></div>
                </div>

    </main>

    <script>
        // 核心邏輯保持不變
        const themes = [
            {
                name: \"FOAM\", id: \"NO.01\", mood: \"Blue Silence\", songTitle: \"Over Nara\", audioSrc: \"foam.mp3\", 
                colors: [\"#4169E1\", \"#1E90FF\", \"#6495ED\", \"#B0C4DE\"], bg: \"#f2f2f2\", text: \"#555\",
                visual: { speed: 0.8, filter: \"blur(60px) contrast(1.2)\", blend: \"normal\", gravity: 0 }, shape: \"circle\"
            },
            {
                name: \"AMBER\", id: \"NO.02\", mood: \"Solar Energy\", songTitle: \"Tree of Life\", audioSrc: \"amber.mp3\",
                colors: [\"#FF4500\", \"#FF6347\", \"#FFD700\", \"#FFF8DC\"], bg: \"#FFFAF0\", text: \"#CD5C5C\",
                visual: { speed: 0.6, filter: \"blur(40px) contrast(1.1) brightness(1.1)\", blend: \"multiply\", gravity: -0.3 }, shape: \"triangle\"
            },
            {
                name: \"NEON\", id: \"NO.03\", mood: \"Digital Rain\", songTitle: \"Neon Tides\", audioSrc: \"neon.mp3\",
                colors: [\"#008B8B\", \"#B87333\", \"#000033\", \"#2F4F4F\", \"#D2691E\"], bg: \"#050505\", text: \"#B87333\",
                visual: { speed: 1.5, filter: \"blur(30px) brightness(1.4) contrast(1.2)\", blend: \"color-dodge\", gravity: 0 }, shape: \"line\"
            },
            {
                name: \"INK\", id: \"NO.04\", mood: \"Block Print\", songTitle: \"Ink on Paper\", audioSrc: \"ink.mp3\",
                colors: [\"#000000\", \"#111111\", \"#FFFFFF\", \"#333333\"], bg: \"#808080\", text: \"#000000\",
                visual: { speed: 0.4, filter: \"blur(25px) contrast(8) grayscale(1)\", blend: \"normal\", gravity: 0.1 }, shape: \"rect\"
            },
            {
                name: \"AURA\", id: \"NO.05\", mood: \"Inner State\", songTitle: \"Healing Freq\", audioSrc: \"aura.mp3\", 
                colors: [\"#98FB98\", \"#00FA9A\", \"#F0FFF0\", \"#ADFF2F\", \"#32CD32\"], bg: \"#e0ffe0\", text: \"#2E8B57\",
                visual: { speed: 0.5, filter: \"blur(50px) brightness(1.05)\", blend: \"screen\", gravity: 0 }, shape: \"ring\"
            }
        ];

        let currentThemeIndex = 0;
        let currentTheme = themes[0];
        const audioElement = document.getElementById('main-audio');
        const startOverlay = document.getElementById('start-overlay');
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-container');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        let width, height, particles = [], mouse = { x: -1000, y: -1000, isActive: false }, autoMouse = { x: 0, y: 0, angle: 0 }, lastMouseMoveTime = 0, simTime = 0;

        function resize() {
            width = window.innerWidth; height = window.innerHeight;
            canvas.width = width; canvas.height = height;
            initParticles();
        }

        class Particle {
            constructor() {
                this.reset();
                this.x = Math.random() * width; this.y = Math.random() * height;
                this.breathSpeed = 0.02 + Math.random() * 0.03; 
                this.breathOffset = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                this.angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                this.rotationSpeed = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02;
            }
            reset() {
                let sizeMod = currentTheme.shape === \"rect\" ? 0.8 : (currentTheme.shape === \"line\" ? 2.0 : 1);
                this.baseSize = (Math.random() * 80 + 100) * sizeMod;
                this.size = this.baseSize;
                this.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * currentTheme.visual.speed;
                this.vy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * currentTheme.visual.speed;
                this.color = currentTheme.colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * currentTheme.colors.length)];
            }
            update() {
                this.vy += currentTheme.visual.gravity * 0.05;
                this.angle += this.rotationSpeed;
                this.x += this.vx; this.y += this.vy;
                const margin = 200;
                if (this.x < -margin) this.x = width + margin; if (this.x > width + margin) this.x = -margin;
                if (this.y < -margin) this.y = height + margin; if (this.y > height + margin) this.y = -margin;
                let targetSize = this.baseSize * (1 + Math.sin(simTime * this.breathSpeed + this.breathOffset) * 0.15);
                let interactX = mouse.isActive ? mouse.x : autoMouse.x;
                let interactY = mouse.isActive ? mouse.y : autoMouse.y;
                const dx = interactX - this.x, dy = interactY - this.y, dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
                if (dist < 400) {
                    const force = (400 - dist) / 400;
                    this.vx -= (dx / dist) * force * 0.08; this.vy -= (dy / dist) * force * 0.08;
                    targetSize += 50 * force;
                }
                this.size += (targetSize - this.size) * 0.05;
            }
            draw() {
                ctx.fillStyle = this.color; ctx.strokeStyle = this.color; ctx.globalCompositeOperation = currentTheme.visual.blend;
                ctx.save(); ctx.translate(this.x, this.y); ctx.rotate(this.angle);
                if (currentTheme.shape === \"circle\") { ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0, 0, this.size, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill(); }
                else if (currentTheme.shape === \"ring\") { ctx.beginPath(); ctx.lineWidth = this.size * 0.2; ctx.arc(0, 0, this.size, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.stroke(); }
                else if (currentTheme.shape === \"triangle\") { ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, -this.size); ctx.lineTo(this.size, this.size); ctx.lineTo(-this.size, this.size); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill(); }
                else if (currentTheme.shape === \"line\") { ctx.fillRect(-1, -this.size, 2, this.size * 2); }
                else if (currentTheme.shape === \"rect\") { ctx.fillRect(-this.size/2, -this.size/2, this.size, this.size); }
                ctx.restore(); ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';
            }
        }

        function initParticles() {
            particles = [];
            let count = width < 768 ? 6 : 10;
            for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) particles.push(new Particle());
        }

        function animate() {
            simTime++;
            autoMouse.angle += 0.01;
            autoMouse.x = width/2 + Math.cos(autoMouse.angle) * (width * 0.3);
            autoMouse.y = height/2 + Math.sin(autoMouse.angle * 2) * (height * 0.2);
            mouse.isActive = (Date.now() - lastMouseMoveTime < 3000);
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);
            particles.forEach(p => { p.update(); p.draw(); });
            requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        }

        function updateUI() {
            const elements = document.querySelectorAll('.fade-text');
            elements.forEach(el => el.classList.add('fading-out'));
            setTimeout(() => {
                document.getElementById('theme-index').innerText = currentTheme.id;
                document.getElementById('mode-name').innerText = currentTheme.name;
                document.getElementById('mood-text').innerText = currentTheme.mood;
                document.getElementById('song-name').innerText = currentTheme.songTitle;
                elements.forEach(el => el.classList.remove('fading-out'));
            }, 500); 
        }

        function switchTheme() {
            currentThemeIndex = (currentThemeIndex + 1) % themes.length;
            currentTheme = themes[currentThemeIndex];
            document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--bg-color', currentTheme.bg);
            document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--text-color', currentTheme.text);
            canvas.style.filter = currentTheme.visual.filter;
            updateUI();
            audioElement.src = currentTheme.audioSrc;
            audioElement.play();
            setTimeout(initParticles, 200);
        }

        startOverlay.addEventListener('click', () => {
            startOverlay.classList.add('hidden');
            audioElement.src = currentTheme.audioSrc;
            audioElement.play().catch(() => {});
        });

        document.body.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (!startOverlay.classList.contains('hidden')) return;
            switchTheme();
        });

        window.addEventListener('mousemove', e => { mouse.x = e.clientX; mouse.y = e.clientY; lastMouseMoveTime = Date.now(); });
        window.addEventListener('touchmove', e => { mouse.x = e.touches[0].clientX; mouse.y = e.touches[0].clientY; lastMouseMoveTime = Date.now(); }, {passive: true});
        window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

        resize(); animate();
    </script>
</body>
</html>
```"""),
            ],
        ),
        types.Content(
            role="user",
            parts=[
                types.Part.from_text(text="""INSERT_INPUT_HERE"""),
            ],
        ),
    ]
    tools = [
        types.Tool(googleSearch=types.GoogleSearch(
        )),
    ]
    generate_content_config = types.GenerateContentConfig(
        thinking_config=types.ThinkingConfig(
            thinking_level="HIGH",
        ),
        tools=tools,
    )

    for chunk in client.models.generate_content_stream(
        model=model,
        contents=contents,
        config=generate_content_config,
    ):
        print(chunk.text, end="")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    generate()
